project.name: course-dev-ide-with-agents
project.description: Collaborative intelligence platform for course content production — deterministic manifest-compiled multi-agent orchestrator (operator surface: Marcus-SPOC) with per-specialist LangGraph scaffolds, HIL gates, learning ledger, and frozen-graph reproducibility, built on LangChain/LangGraph.

nodes.name: resume_api.py
nodes.summary: Gate-verdict resume substrate: registers issued decision cards with nonce and digest, validates operator verdicts against them (replay/nonce/digest checks), and converts an accepted verdict into a LangGraph resume Command or transport response.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses canonical-JSON SHA-256 digests and consumed-nonce tracking to make gate resumes single-use and tamper-evident.

nodes.name: compute_decision_card_digest
nodes.summary: Computes a deterministic SHA-256 digest over the canonical-JSON tuple of decision card, trial id, issuance timestamp, and server nonce.

nodes.name: register_decision_card
nodes.summary: Registers a decision card in the in-process resume registry, stamping issuance time, a fresh server nonce, and the card digest.

nodes.name: build_transport_response
nodes.summary: Builds the transport-facing response for a gate verdict, emitting a ledger event and packaging resume payload metadata for HTTP/CLI/MCP carriers.

nodes.name: resume_from_verdict
nodes.summary: Validates an operator verdict against the registered decision card (existence, digest match, nonce replay) and returns the LangGraph resume Command.

nodes.name: storyboard_publisher.py
nodes.summary: Automatic ONLINE storyboard publication at storyboard review gates: at gate pause it invokes the proven legacy generate-storyboard script against the envelope's Gary contribution, writes segment manifests for Storyboard B, and records the publish receipt before the decision card is issued.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads the legacy generator script via importlib.util.spec_from_file_location rather than a package import, deliberately reusing the hand-validated skills-tree routine.

nodes.name: publish_storyboard_for_gate
nodes.summary: End-to-end gate-time publisher: extracts the Gary payload from the production envelope, writes the segment manifest, runs the legacy generator's generate and publish commands, and verifies the publish receipt.

nodes.name: enrich_segments_for_export
nodes.summary: Enriches narration segments with per-delta metadata (slide keys, cluster arcs, voice direction) keyed by delta id for the exported storyboard manifest.

nodes.name: _write_segment_manifest_for_b
nodes.summary: Joins Irene narration segments (guarding against phantom/collapsed segment ids), enriches them, and writes the Storyboard B segment manifest YAML into the run directory.

nodes.name: _cluster_arc_by_id
nodes.summary: Derives a cluster-arc lookup keyed by unit id from the Irene Pass-1 lesson plan carried in the production envelope.

nodes.name: adapter.py
nodes.summary: Thin ChatOpenAI factory (Story 1.3): resolves the model for a specialist through the three-level cascade selector and returns a plain ChatOpenAI handle paired with the ModelResolutionEntry audit record — deliberately no LangChain agent abstractions.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicit-return pattern: the caller appends the resolution entry to RunState.model_resolution_trail; no ContextVar or global state.

nodes.name: ChatModelHandle
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass pairing the constructed ChatOpenAI instance with the ModelResolutionEntry that records how its model was resolved.

nodes.name: make_chat_model
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective model for a specialist via the cascade selector, applies LangSmith span tags and per-call overrides, and constructs the ChatOpenAI client wrapped in a ChatModelHandle.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel re-exporting the perception artifact contract types (PerceptionArtifact plus its coverage, confidence, reading-path, and image-role literals) consumed by downstream QA gates.

nodes.name: perception_artifact.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic v2 contract for slide perception artifacts consumed by Quinn-R P2-1: captures extracted text, visual elements, coverage/confidence state, reading-path metadata, and image-role classification for each perceived slide.
nodes.languageNotes: Rich Literal-typed enums (coverage, provenance, reading path, macro layout) give closed-vocabulary validation without separate enum classes.

nodes.name: PerceptionArtifact
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic model of one slide's perception result: slide identity, extracted text/title, visual elements, coverage and confidence, reading-path plan with provenance flags, and image-role tiers.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: State-model package barrel (Slab 1 substrate): re-exports the Pydantic v2 state models (RunState, StoryState, CacheState, checkpoints, fingerprints, envelopes) that encode the LangGraph state contract and reproducibility invariants NFR-X1 through X5.

nodes.name: cache_state.py
nodes.summary: CacheState model tracking sanctum cold-read cache-prefix stability (architecture D5): cache prefix, entry count, and timezone-aware last-invalidation timestamp.

nodes.name: CacheState
nodes.summary: Pydantic model recording the cache-prefix-stability state for sanctum cold reads, with a validator enforcing timezone-aware invalidation timestamps.

nodes.name: model_resolution_entry.py
nodes.summary: ModelResolutionEntry model: one audited level of the three-level model cascade (per_call → per_specialist → registry_default → auto_select_fallback), carrying the NFR-I6 cache-prefix hash as a validated SHA-256 hex identifier.

nodes.name: ModelResolutionEntry
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of a single cascade resolution step (level, requested, resolved, reason, timestamp) with validators enforcing timezone-aware timestamps and a well-formed SHA-256 hex cache-prefix hash.

nodes.name: run_state.py
nodes.summary: Top-level RunState model encoding the five reproducibility invariants (byte-for-byte replay, frozen graph version, sanctum fingerprint, model-resolution trail, documented temperature variance) that every LangGraph handler reads and writes against.
nodes.languageNotes: Cross-field invariants live in a companion validators module per the NFR-M5 four-file-lockstep discipline.

nodes.name: RunState
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of the whole run: run id (UUID4-enforced), status/timestamps, graph version allow-list, model resolution trail, sanctum and Marcus fingerprints, story states, cache state, production envelope, and LLM execution mode.

nodes.name: run_state_validators.py
nodes.summary: Standalone cross-field validator for RunState: enforces that status "complete" requires completed_at to be set, lifted out so tests can exercise the invariant without constructing a full RunState.

nodes.name: enforce_complete_requires_completed_at
nodes.summary: Raises ValueError when a run is marked complete without a completed_at timestamp (or vice versa), mirroring NodeCheckpoint's invariant.

nodes.name: perception_harness.py
nodes.summary: A2 perception eval harness comparing realtime versus batch vision-perception arms over frozen slide fixtures: scores each arm for non-vacuous output, diffs the scores field-by-field, and writes a JSON compare report. Eval sidecar only — never mutates production routing.

nodes.name: SlideScore
nodes.summary: Dataclass scoring one slide's perception output (title, extracted text, visual element count, confidence, layout) with a non_vacuous predicate.

nodes.name: CompareReport
nodes.summary: Dataclass for the versioned realtime-vs-batch comparison report, including per-slide scores, deltas, and the both-arms-non-vacuous claim.

nodes.name: score_perception
nodes.summary: Scores a perception response (typed model or raw mapping) into a SlideScore, normalizing title, extracted text, layout, and confidence fields.

nodes.name: compare_arm_scores
nodes.summary: Diffs realtime and batch SlideScores field-by-field into ScoreDeltas and assembles the CompareReport with the both-arms-non-vacuous verdict.

nodes.name: run_live_compare
nodes.summary: Live-evidence leg: perceives each frozen slide via the realtime provider and the vision batch pipeline, scores both arms, and writes the compare report.

nodes.name: contract.py
nodes.summary: Canonical 9-node specialist scaffold contract (production-side authority): defines the required LangGraph node set every specialist graph must expose, plus discovery and conformance-validation helpers used by scaffold tests and the generator.
nodes.languageNotes: Moved out of tests/ so production entry points never import from the test tree; the old test module re-exports from here.

nodes.name: ScaffoldConformanceResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass reporting a specialist graph's conformance to the 9-node contract: present, missing, and extra node ids with an is_conforming predicate.

nodes.name: discover_specialist_ids
nodes.summary: Enumerates specialist package directories under the specialists root, skipping underscore-prefixed scaffolding packages.

nodes.name: build_specialist_graph
nodes.summary: Dynamically imports app.specialists.<id>.graph and invokes its build_<id>_graph factory to construct the specialist subgraph.

nodes.name: validate_scaffold
nodes.summary: Compares a built subgraph's node ids against the canonical 9-node set and returns a ScaffoldConformanceResult.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Canonical 9-node scaffold LangGraph used by the specialist generator: stub receive/plan/act/verify/reflect/emit-spans/gate-decision/finalize/handoff nodes wired in the contract order, with build-time transition-reachability assertions.

nodes.name: _assert_transition_reachability
nodes.summary: BFS over the declared transition map asserting every canonical node is reachable from the start node, failing fast at import/build time on wiring drift.

nodes.name: build_scaffold_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs the canonical StateGraph over RunState with the 9 scaffold nodes and contract-ordered edges, verifying the node set matches SCAFFOLD_NODE_IDS.

nodes.name: figure_tokens.py
nodes.summary: Shared numeric figure-token extraction leaf for narration/perception fidelity gates: regex-extracts money/percent/multiplier figures from text, normalizes surface forms (thousands separators, trillion/billion units), and near-matches narration figures against source figures.
nodes.languageNotes: The number regex requires full ",xxx" groups so "$1,200" is never truncated to "$120" — surface-form precision is load-bearing for the narration fidelity gate.

nodes.name: _figures
nodes.summary: Extracts the set of money, percentage, and multiplier figure tokens from text via the shared figure regex.

nodes.name: _normalize_figure
nodes.summary: Normalizes a figure token to a canonical comparable form, resolving thousands separators and trillion/billion unit suffixes to numeric magnitudes.

nodes.name: _figure_near_match
nodes.summary: Determines whether a narration figure near-matches any source figure after normalization, tolerating rounding-level differences.

nodes.name: voice_direction_map.py
nodes.summary: FROZEN pure-leaf mapper from directed-voice direction (tone/pace/energy) to ElevenLabs TTS settings, shared by Enrique TTS dispatch and Storyboard B display parity. Hosts the import-frozen direction table plus caller-driven default loaders implementing the Marcus control-card 5-tier voice-id precedence.
nodes.languageNotes: The direction table is loaded once at import into a recursively-immutable MappingProxyType so the frozen-neck claim is structural, not conventional.

nodes.name: load_style_guide_tts_defaults
nodes.summary: Loads style-guide-level TTS defaults (voice id, model, settings) from a style guide YAML path for the lowest tiers of the voice precedence chain.

nodes.name: clean_default_tier
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw default-tier value into the canonical tier vocabulary, rejecting unknown tiers.

nodes.name: resolve_voice_id_with_source
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective ElevenLabs voice id across the 5-tier precedence (direction, segment, pass-2 defaults, operator selection, style guide) and reports which tier won.

nodes.name: map_voice_direction_to_tts
nodes.summary: Pure mapper from a VoiceDirection (tone/pace/energy) plus layered defaults to concrete ElevenLabs TTS settings, consulting the frozen direction table and the resolved voice id.

nodes.name: voice_provider_text.py
nodes.summary: Pure-leaf TAG-ONLY provider-text compiler for ElevenLabs eleven_v3 (enhanced-VO Slice 1): compiles canonical narration text plus rhetorical role into tag-channel provider text, splits text channels, and audits that rhetorical additions stay contained within source vocabulary.
nodes.languageNotes: v3 sibling of the frozen v2 numeric mapper: same frozen-constant idioms (frozenset/MappingProxyType loaded once at import) and a typed tagged error for one-line mapping into EnriqueActError.

nodes.name: compile_provider_text
nodes.summary: Compiles canonical narration text plus a rhetorical role into eleven_v3 provider text carrying audio tags in the tag channel only.

nodes.name: build_text_channels
nodes.summary: Builds the dual text-channel record (canonical vs provider text with hashes) that keeps VO/on-screen alignment auditable.

nodes.name: assert_no_tag_leak
nodes.summary: Asserts that audio tags never leak into a channel that must stay tag-free, raising a tagged VoiceProviderTextError on violation.

nodes.name: audit_rhetorical_source_containment
nodes.summary: Audits that rhetorically added words are contained within the source text vocabulary (minus allowed connective/clinical terms), returning the violating words.

nodes.name: assert_rhetorical_source_containment
nodes.summary: Assertion wrapper over the containment audit that raises a tagged error listing escaped rhetorical words.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Generated 9-node scaffold LangGraph for specialist Aria: decodes the operator-instructions envelope, assembles a build spec via an LLM act node using the cascade-resolved chat model, and exposes the canonical gate-decision/finalize/handoff nodes.

nodes.name: _parse_operator_instructions_envelope
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the operator-instructions payload from the specialist envelope, raising OperatorInstructionsParseError on malformed input.

nodes.name: _assemble_build_spec
nodes.summary: Assembles Aria's build-spec prompt/spec structure from the parsed operator instructions.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: Aria act node: obtains the cascade-resolved chat model, invokes the LLM over the assembled spec, and records output plus model-resolution trail into state.

nodes.name: build_aria_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs Aria's canonical 9-node StateGraph over RunState with contract-ordered edges.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: CD creative-director specialist graph (Story 2b.6): parses the CD directive from LLM output, canonicalizes it, and resolves style-guide bindings against the styleguide SSOT with digest-bound guide entries — the largest directive-resolution surface among the specialist graphs.

nodes.name: CdDirectiveParseError
nodes.summary: Typed parse error for malformed CD directives, carrying a tag and raw-excerpt context for recoverable error-pauses.

nodes.name: assert_sanctum_lock
nodes.summary: Asserts the CD sanctum directory manifest matches the expected snapshot, raising on drift to protect prompt determinism.

nodes.name: _assemble_cd_prompt
nodes.summary: Assembles the CD prompt from the envelope payload, extracted source, sanctum references, and profile-target blocks.

nodes.name: _canonicalize_cd_directive
nodes.summary: Canonicalizes a parsed CD directive into the ratified shape, normalizing fields and attaching the raw excerpt for audit.

nodes.name: _styleguide_resolution_from_projection
nodes.summary: Resolves the directive's style-guide references against the styleguide SSOT: validates variants, binds guide entries to the SSOT digest, and produces per-variant resolution or typed error records.

nodes.name: _parse_cd_directive
nodes.summary: Extracts and validates the JSON CD directive from raw LLM content, raising CdDirectiveParseError with excerpt context on failure.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: CD act node: sanctum-locked prompt assembly, LLM invocation via the cascade-resolved model, directive parsing/canonicalization, and styleguide resolution recorded into state.

nodes.name: build_cd_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs CD's canonical 9-node StateGraph with contract-ordered edges.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the Compositor deterministic assembly specialist, re-exporting build_compositor_graph.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Compositor Class-D2 deterministic assembly pipeline: syncs visual and motion assets from the bundle into the assembly tree, regenerates the assembly guide with masked volatile fields, and produces field-masked hashes for reproducibility checks — no LLM involved.

nodes.name: sync_visuals
nodes.summary: Copies visual and motion asset rows from the bundle into the assembly target tree, returning the copied-asset records.

nodes.name: regenerate_assembly_guide
nodes.summary: Regenerates the assembly guide document from the payload and copied assets, applying field masking so volatile values do not break hash stability.

nodes.name: run_compositor_pipeline
nodes.summary: Runs the full deterministic compositor pipeline: decode bundle, sync visuals/motion, regenerate the assembly guide, and compute masked hashes.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Compositor act entry point invoked by the graph: runs the pipeline over the decoded envelope payload and maps failures to CompositorActError.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Compositor deterministic assembly specialist graph (Story 7b.11): canonical 9-node LangGraph whose act node delegates to the Class-D2 deterministic pipeline — no chat model is resolved since the compositor is LLM-free.

nodes.name: build_compositor_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs the Compositor's canonical 9-node StateGraph over RunState with contract-ordered edges.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Compositor consumed-payload contract: the frozen set of envelope payload keys the deterministic assembly reads, asserted by Ratchet-D against node 14's dependency projections.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Dan Class-D1 LLM-only creative-director aux implementation: decodes the envelope payload, assembles the Dan prompt with sanctum digest, invokes the provided chat model, and parses auxiliary creative contributions from the LLM response.

nodes.name: decode_envelope_payload
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates the specialist envelope payload from state, raising a tagged DanAuxParseError on malformed input.

nodes.name: read_sanctum_digest
nodes.summary: Reads and hashes the Dan sanctum directory contents to pin the prompt provenance digest.

nodes.name: parse_aux_contributions
nodes.summary: Extracts and validates the JSON aux-contributions block from raw LLM content against the payload's expectations, with tagged errors on shape violations.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Dan act implementation: assembles the prompt, invokes the injected chat model handle, parses aux contributions, and returns the contribution record with dispatch trail.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Dan creative-director aux specialist graph (Story 7b.10): canonical 9-node LangGraph whose act node resolves a chat model via the cascade adapter and delegates to the Dan Class-D1 act implementation.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: Dan graph act node: resolves the chat model via make_chat_model and delegates to the _act implementation module, recording the resolution entry.

nodes.name: build_dan_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs Dan's canonical 9-node StateGraph over RunState with contract-ordered edges.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Desmond descript-assembly specialist graph (Story 2b.4): sanctum-locked prompt assembly over Desmond references, LLM invocation via the cascade-resolved model, and structured handoff parsing from raw LLM content within the canonical 9-node scaffold.

nodes.name: _read_sanctum_digest
nodes.summary: Reads Desmond's sanctum files and computes the provenance digest pinning prompt inputs.

nodes.name: assert_sanctum_lock
nodes.summary: Asserts the Desmond sanctum manifest matches the expected snapshot, raising on drift.

nodes.name: _assemble_desmond_prompt
nodes.summary: Assembles the Desmond prompt from the envelope payload and sanctum reference documents.

nodes.name: _parse_handoff
nodes.summary: Extracts and validates the structured handoff JSON from raw LLM content, raising HandoffParseError with context on malformed output.

nodes.name: _act
nodes.summary: Desmond act node: sanctum lock check, prompt assembly, chat-model invocation, handoff parsing, and contribution recording into state.

nodes.name: build_desmond_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs Desmond's canonical 9-node StateGraph with contract-ordered edges.

nodes.name: dispatch_errors.py
nodes.summary: Shared typed base classes for specialist dispatch errors: the production runner catches SpecialistDispatchError to convert transient dispatch failures into recoverable error-pauses instead of killing the trial; per-seam fail-loud error classes re-base here.

nodes.name: SpecialistDispatchError
nodes.summary: Tagged base exception for specialist dispatch failures; the production runner catches this base to error-pause a trial recoverably.

nodes.name: AssetResolutionError
nodes.summary: Dispatch-error subclass raised when a specialist cannot resolve a required asset path or artifact.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Enrique Class-C ElevenLabs act implementation: builds the voice-selection contract from the provider voice catalog, resolves per-segment directed-voice plans through the 5-tier precedence, dispatches TTS synthesis per segment with receipt reuse, measures MP3 durations, writes VTT captions, and assembles the compositor-ready audio bundle.
nodes.languageNotes: build_assembly_bundle is a ~290-line orchestrator: per-segment receipt reuse keeps re-runs idempotent, and directed-voice plans compose the frozen v2 mapper with the v3 tag-channel compiler.

nodes.name: build_voice_selection_contract
nodes.summary: Builds the operator-facing voice-selection contract from the ElevenLabs voice catalog: candidate voices with previews, cost notes, and the config-recommended voice id.

nodes.name: _segments
nodes.summary: Extracts and validates the ordered narration segment list from the payload (Irene Pass-2 output), normalizing ids and text surfaces.

nodes.name: _mp3_duration_seconds
nodes.summary: Computes MP3 duration by parsing frame headers directly from the audio bytes, avoiding an external audio dependency.

nodes.name: _DirectedPlan
nodes.summary: Per-segment directed-voice execution plan: resolved voice id and source tier, TTS settings, provider text channels, and audit metadata.

nodes.name: _resolve_directed_plan
nodes.summary: Resolves one segment's directed-voice plan: maps voice direction to TTS settings via the frozen mapper, compiles v3 provider text with tag-leak and containment audits, and records the winning precedence tier.

nodes.name: build_assembly_bundle
nodes.summary: Core audio assembly orchestrator: iterates segments, reuses valid receipts, dispatches ElevenLabs synthesis, measures durations, writes VTT and receipts, and emits the bundle manifest for the compositor.

nodes.name: generate_enrique_outputs
nodes.summary: Routes the act between voice-selection-contract mode and assembly-bundle mode based on the payload phase.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Enrique act entry point: decodes the envelope payload, generates outputs with the injected ElevenLabs client, and maps failures to tagged EnriqueActError records.

nodes.name: elevenlabs_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Importlib dispatch seam loading the legacy skills-tree elevenlabs_operations.py module (with package stubs for its expected import context) and dispatching allow-listed Enrique operation modes to it, coercing provider API errors into tagged dispatch errors.
nodes.languageNotes: Injects synthetic module stubs into sys.modules so the file-loaded legacy script resolves its package-relative imports outside its home tree.

nodes.name: _load_operations_module
nodes.summary: Loads the legacy elevenlabs_operations.py from the skills tree via importlib file-location spec after installing package stubs.

nodes.name: dispatch_to_elevenlabs
nodes.summary: Validates the requested mode against the Enrique allow-list, invokes the corresponding legacy operation, and wraps API failures into tagged ElevenlabsDispatchError records.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Enrique (ElevenLabs audio) specialist LangGraph: wires the standard 9-node scaffold (receive through handoff) around Enrique's act implementation, loading sanctum digest and skill references and binding the gate-decision interrupt to the resume API.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Enrique consumed-payload contract: a frozen set of every envelope payload key Enrique's act body reads, asserted by the Ratchet-D manifest lockstep test to prevent silently ungrounded audio dispatches.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Gary's Gamma slide-generation act implementation: normalizes styleguide-resolved Gamma API settings, generates classic and studio deck variants (with per-slide studio image cards), and emits styleguide parity receipts and fidelity cohorts for downstream gating.
nodes.languageNotes: Setting normalization is a single large deterministic pass (~240 lines) so that classic/studio surface-key validation and enum checks live in one auditable place.

nodes.name: gamma_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Thin dispatch seam between Gary and the Gamma generation backend: routes to the live gamma_operations executor or a deterministic fixture receipt, raising GammaDispatchError on pre-receipt failures.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Gary gamma-generation specialist LangGraph (Story 2b.1): 9-node scaffold that decodes the envelope payload, records dispatch-trail entries, parses Gamma dispatch receipts, and binds the gate-decision interrupt to the resume API.

nodes.name: learned_dependencies.py
nodes.summary: Hermetic learned-dependencies store for the CD-owned Gamma styleguide: an append-only digest-idempotent JSONL observation ledger plus manifest-pinned promoted YAML rules, applied offline to Gamma settings with predicate evaluation and pin verification.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately file-based (not the Postgres event ledger) so rule validation stays offline and hermetic; observations are deduplicated by content digest.

nodes.name: styleguide_library.py
nodes.summary: Byte-compatible barrel re-export of the shared Gamma styleguide resolver (app.styleguide.resolver), preserving Gary's full prior public API so existing import sites keep working after the strangler-fig extraction.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Irene specialist package barrel: re-exports build_irene_graph plus the IreneEnvelope and IreneReturn state types.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel for the Irene Pass-2 authoring contract: re-exports the Pydantic envelope, segment-manifest, voice-direction, and perception-projection surface from pass_2_template.

nodes.name: pass_2_template.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic source of truth for Irene Pass-2 authoring guidance: strict models for Gary slide output, perception artifacts, segment manifests, voice direction, and the top-level IrenePass2AuthoringEnvelope with cross-artifact shape validation.
nodes.languageNotes: Path validators avoid negative lookahead (unsupported by Pydantic v2's Rust regex) by rejecting colons outside a Windows drive prefix — an operator-ratified trade-off.

nodes.name: build_enrique_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs and compiles Enrique's 9-node LangGraph StateGraph, registering the scaffold node sequence and edges from START to END.

nodes.name: decode_envelope_payload
nodes.summary: Decodes and validates the JSON envelope payload dispatched to Gary, raising GaryActError on malformed input.

nodes.name: _normalized_gamma_settings
nodes.summary: Normalizes the raw styleguide-resolved settings into validated Gamma API options: theme resolution, enum validation, classic-only surface-key enforcement, and studio overrides, in one deterministic pass.

nodes.name: _instructions_for_variant
nodes.summary: Composes the additional-instructions string for a deck variant by layering source-derived instructions on top of the styleguide base instructions.

nodes.name: _assert_studio_image_card
nodes.summary: Asserts that a generated studio card satisfies the per-slide image contract, raising with diagnostic detail when the card shape is invalid.

nodes.name: _generate_studio_variant
nodes.summary: Generates the studio deck variant via per-slide single-card Gamma calls, validating each image card and accumulating per-slide receipts.

nodes.name: _styleguide_parity_receipt
nodes.summary: Builds the styleguide parity receipt by comparing Gary's local resolution against the shared resolver's canonical digest, recording classification and crash detail for audit.

nodes.name: _classic_generation_kwargs
nodes.summary: Assembles the keyword arguments for a classic (non-studio) Gamma generation call from the normalized settings and variant-specific text, image, and card options.

nodes.name: generate_gamma_variants
nodes.summary: Core generation loop: produces classic and studio Gamma deck variants from the envelope payload, applies learned rules and parity receipts, partitions binary-fidelity cohorts, and returns the full dispatch receipt bundle.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Gary's act entry point: decodes the envelope, runs generate_gamma_variants, and shapes the specialist return payload with trail entries and receipts.

nodes.name: dispatch_to_gamma
nodes.summary: Dispatches a generation request to the Gamma backend via the gamma_operations executor, falling back to a deterministic fixture receipt in non-billing/dev paths and wrapping failures in GammaDispatchError.

nodes.name: _parse_dispatch_receipt
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the Gamma dispatch receipt structure returned by the act node, raising ReceiptParseError with diagnostics when required fields are missing or malformed.

nodes.name: build_gary_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs and compiles Gary's 9-node LangGraph StateGraph with the scaffold node sequence and gate-decision interrupt wiring.

nodes.name: apply_learned_rules
nodes.summary: Applies active promoted learned rules to a Gamma settings dict, evaluating each rule's predicate and recording which rules fired for the receipt trail.

nodes.name: predicate_hash
nodes.summary: Computes a stable content digest of a rule predicate for idempotent ledger deduplication and manifest pinning.

nodes.name: read_observations
nodes.summary: Reads the append-only JSONL observation ledger from disk, returning parsed observation records.

nodes.name: append_observation
nodes.summary: Appends a new observation to the JSONL ledger, digest-idempotently skipping records already present so re-runs stay byte-identical.

nodes.name: load_manifest
nodes.summary: Loads the learned-rules lock manifest (gamma-learned-rules.lock) used to pin promoted rule identity.

nodes.name: check_manifest_pin
nodes.summary: Validates promoted rules against the identity-manifest pin so a rule cannot silently vanish or mutate: verifies digests, provenance citations, and lock coverage, returning structured failure detail.

nodes.name: active_learned_rules
nodes.summary: Returns the currently active promoted learned rules after manifest-pin verification, the safe read surface consumed by Gary's act path.

nodes.name: GarySlideOutput
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic model of a single Gary-produced slide artifact, validating that the file path is a PNG.

nodes.name: PerceptionArtifact
nodes.summary: Minimal authoring-envelope projection of the rich upstream perception artifact — template/validator-compatible but not a runtime grounding authority.

nodes.name: ElevenLabsSettings
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of ElevenLabs TTS synthesis settings (stability, similarity, style, speed) carried in the voice-direction contract.

nodes.name: DialogueTurn
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of a single dialogue turn within a narration segment, with speaker and text fields.

nodes.name: VoiceDirection
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of delivery-metadata voice direction (tone, pacing, emphasis, TTS defaults) attached to frozen segments; coerces sequences to tuples for immutability.

nodes.name: SegmentManifestSegment
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of one segment-manifest row (segment id, narration text, visual file, behavioral intent), normalizing the visual file reference.

nodes.name: IrenePass2AuthoringEnvelope
nodes.summary: Top-level strict Pydantic envelope for Irene Pass-2 authoring: validates UTC-aware generation timestamps, complete procedural rules, and cross-artifact shape consistency between slides, perception artifacts, and segment manifests.

nodes.name: project_rich_perception_for_authoring
nodes.summary: Projects the rich vision-produced perception artifact down to the minimal authoring-envelope PerceptionArtifact shape for template and validator compatibility.

nodes.name: voice_direction_annotation.py
nodes.summary: Pure, deterministic post-freeze voice-direction annotation pass (P5 Step 2): layers voice_direction delivery metadata onto an already-frozen, figure-gate-passed segment manifest without touching any grounded field, so delivery intent can never leak into word choice.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately a separate pure pass (no I/O, no LLM, no clock, no randomness) rather than part of the LLM Pass-2 call; segments are deep-copied so caller input is never mutated.

nodes.name: warm_callback.py
nodes.summary: Pure deterministic safety core for warm callbacks: computes the grounded anchor denominator (strictly-prior teachable parent components) and enforces the Vera-R7 block-by-omission gate so an ungrounded callback is dropped whole rather than stripped.

nodes.name: warm_callback_authoring.py
nodes.summary: Generative half of the warm-callback feature: default-OFF env flag plus an injectable renderer seam whose prompt structurally forbids figures, negation, and comparators so polarity reversal is unreachable by construction.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Irene Pass-2 specialist graph: the largest specialist module, assembling the byte-stable Pass-2 narration prompt, invoking the LLM, and enforcing an extensive grounding regime — figure-fidelity assertions, reading-path conformance, slide-key joins, warm-callback attachment, and voice-direction annotation — before the gate-decision interrupt.
nodes.languageNotes: Prompt assembly is pinned byte-stable (sorted POSIX paths, CRLF-normalized reads, canonical json.dumps, no datetimes/UUIDs) so cache prefixes are deterministic across platforms.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Irene Pass-2 consumed-payload contract: the frozen set of envelope keys the Pass-2 act body reads, asserted by the Ratchet-D manifest lockstep test to prevent ungrounded-prompt regressions.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Irene Pass-1 lesson-plan coauthoring act: assembles the planning prompt from the extracted source bundle and planning context, parses and normalizes the LLM's cluster/collateral/fidelity emissions, honors the min-cluster floor, writes the lesson plan artifact, and manages plan-unit ratification.

nodes.name: cluster_floor.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic, split-only min_cluster_floor engine for the real Pass-1 surface: detects clusters as contiguous plan_unit runs, classifies seam legitimacy from verbatim source anchors (figure/narration/claim roles), and splits clusters at legitimate seams to honor the scripted floor.
nodes.languageNotes: Splitting reshapes cluster boundaries only, in the existing Epic-19/20c cluster vocabulary; seam roles are classified deterministically from anchor text, never by LLM.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Irene Pass-1 9-node scaffold LangGraph wiring the standard receive-through-handoff node sequence around the Pass-1 act implementation with a gate-decision interrupt.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Irene Pass-1 consumed-payload contract: frozen set of envelope keys (mode, run placement, upstream_output, bundle_reference, min_cluster_floor, planning_context) checked by the Ratchet-D manifest-vocabulary test.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Kim specialist 9-node scaffold graph: parses the operator-instructions envelope, assembles CourseArc instructions in the act node, and follows the standard receive-through-handoff sequence with gate interrupt and resume binding.

nodes.name: annotate_segments_with_voice_direction
nodes.summary: The annotation pass itself: deep-copies each frozen segment and attaches a voice_direction resolved by the pinned precedence (per-segment override, contribution overlay, defaults), refusing to modify any grounded field and reporting offending locations on violation.

nodes.name: select_grounded_callback_anchors
nodes.summary: Computes the grounding denominator for warm callbacks: the strictly-prior teachable parent component_ids a callback may legitimately reference, from compute_teaches_after intersected with derive_teachable; returns an empty tuple when nothing qualifies.

nodes.name: WarmCallbackGateResult
nodes.summary: Result dataclass for the warm-callback gate: kept flag plus the containment audit trail the caller records.

nodes.name: gate_warm_callback
nodes.summary: The Vera-R7 gate with teeth: runs rhetorical-source containment and the no-new-figure check against the frozen figure_tokens neck; a failure returns kept=False so the caller drops the whole callback (strip is forbidden).

nodes.name: warm_callback_authoring_active
nodes.summary: Default-OFF environment flag check for warm-callback authoring; when off, Pass-2 output is byte-unchanged.

nodes.name: build_warm_callback_render_messages
nodes.summary: Builds the renderer prompt messages that constrain the callback to reference the prior concept only — no numerals, negation, or comparators — making polarity reversal unreachable by construction (AC6).

nodes.name: render_warm_callback
nodes.summary: Injectable renderer seam: invokes the supplied model callable (real chat-invoke in production, deterministic fake in tests) with the constrained prompt and returns the rendered callback text.

nodes.name: narration_figure_fidelity_active
nodes.summary: Environment-flag check controlling whether the narration figure-fidelity grounding regime is enforced during Pass 2.

nodes.name: _slide_roster
nodes.summary: Builds the canonical slide roster from Gary slide output and lesson-plan units, establishing the slide-id join surface every downstream grounding assertion validates against.

nodes.name: backfill_delta_ids
nodes.summary: Backfills missing segment-manifest delta identifiers deterministically so downstream consumers (Enrique's audio joins) always see complete, joinable delta rows.

nodes.name: backfill_delta_perception_sources
nodes.summary: Backfills perception-source references onto segment-manifest deltas from the per-slide perception artifacts so each delta carries its visual evidence provenance.

nodes.name: assert_callback_reading_path
nodes.summary: Asserts injected warm callbacks do not break the VO-to-on-screen reading-path conformance of the segment they were attached to.

nodes.name: assert_pass2_surfaces_validatable
nodes.summary: Pre-flight assertion that all Pass-2 output surfaces (roster, deltas, canonical fields) are present and shaped so the grounding gate suite can actually validate them, failing loud instead of silently skipping.

nodes.name: _attach_warm_callbacks
nodes.summary: Warm-callback attachment pipeline: selects grounded anchors, renders the callback via the injectable seam, runs the Vera-R7 gate, injects passing callbacks into the canonical segment fields, and restamps rhetorical-role keys — dropping any callback that fails containment.

nodes.name: _assemble_pass_2_prompt
nodes.summary: Assembles the byte-stable Pass-2 narration prompt from sanctum files, skill references, redacted payload sections, perceived-figure blocks, and source-figure authority — deterministic for cache-prefix stability (NFR-I6).

nodes.name: _act_pass_1
nodes.summary: Legacy Pass-1 act path inside the Irene graph: assembles the Pass-1 prompt, invokes the chat model, and parses the plan response.

nodes.name: _attach_voice_direction
nodes.summary: Post-freeze wiring of the voice-direction annotation pass: resolves defaults, overrides, and role-derived per-slide seeds from the payload and applies annotate_segments_with_voice_direction to the frozen segment manifest when the flag is active.

nodes.name: _act_pass_2
nodes.summary: The Pass-2 act body: assembles the prompt, invokes the LLM, parses the response, backfills delta ids and perception sources, runs the full grounding assertion suite, attaches warm callbacks and voice direction, and stamps slide keys.

nodes.name: build_irene_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs and compiles Irene's 9-node LangGraph StateGraph with the scaffold node sequence and gate-decision interrupt wiring.

nodes.name: enforce_pass1_mode
nodes.summary: Validates the envelope's mode/pass_phase keys declare Pass-1, raising ModeMismatchError on any other mode.

nodes.name: _build_planning_provenance
nodes.summary: Builds the planning-provenance record (source bundle hashes, planning-context digests) embedded in the lesson-plan artifact for audit.

nodes.name: assemble_pass1_prompt
nodes.summary: Assembles the Pass-1 coauthoring prompt from sanctum, references, extracted source corpus, planning context, and the cluster/fidelity/collateral emission instructions — stripping runner-context keys like min_cluster_floor from the LLM-visible text.

nodes.name: normalize_clusters
nodes.summary: Normalizes the LLM's emitted plan_units into the canonical Epic-19/20c cluster vocabulary: cluster ids, head/interstitial roles, parent slide ids, and interstitial counts, repairing common emission defects deterministically.

nodes.name: normalize_collateral
nodes.summary: Normalizes the emitted collateral specification (workbook sections, exercises, enrichment goals) against the CollateralSpec contract.

nodes.name: normalize_fidelity
nodes.summary: Canonicalizes the per-unit fidelity emissions into the pinned fidelity vocabulary used by downstream binary-fidelity cohorts.

nodes.name: parse_pass1_response
nodes.summary: Parses the raw LLM Pass-1 response into the structured lesson-plan dict, extracting the JSON body and validating top-level shape.

nodes.name: write_lesson_plan
nodes.summary: Writes the normalized lesson plan (plus provenance and collateral artifact lines) to the run directory as the durable Pass-1 artifact.

nodes.name: confirm_plan_units
nodes.summary: Applies operator ratification verdicts to plan units, rejecting bulk ratification and unit-level mismatches with dedicated error types.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Pass-1 act entry point: enforces mode, reads the source bundle, assembles the prompt, invokes the LLM, normalizes clusters/collateral/fidelity, consumes the min-cluster floor, writes the lesson plan, and returns the specialist payload.

nodes.name: unit_source_refs
nodes.summary: Extracts the verbatim source_refs anchor strings from a plan unit for seam-legitimacy analysis.

nodes.name: classify_anchor_role
nodes.summary: Deterministically classifies a source anchor into the fixed role vocabulary {figure, narration, claim} from image/file markers, frozen figure-token numeral hits, or narration markers.

nodes.name: group_plan_clusters
nodes.summary: Groups the flat plan_units list into clusters as contiguous runs sharing a cluster_id.

nodes.name: _run_seams
nodes.summary: Enumerates candidate split seams within a cluster run, deriving each seam's legitimacy from adjacent units' anchor roles and bond rules.

nodes.name: _split_run
nodes.summary: Splits a cluster run at chosen seams: promotes the trailing part's first unit to head of a newly minted cluster and recounts interstitials, reshaping boundaries only in the existing vocabulary.

nodes.name: honor_min_cluster_floor
nodes.summary: The core floor-honoring pass: when the plan's cluster count is below the scripted min_cluster_floor, splits clusters at legitimate seams (split-only, never merges) until the floor is met or no legitimate seams remain.

nodes.name: consume_min_cluster_floor
nodes.summary: Consumes the min_cluster_floor runner-context key from the payload, validates its configuration, runs honor_min_cluster_floor, and returns a FloorConsumption receipt.

nodes.name: assert_floor_consulted
nodes.summary: Post-hoc assertion that the floor pass was actually consulted for the run, guarding against a dead-config floor silently skipped (DeadFloorConfigError).

nodes.name: FloorConsumption
nodes.summary: Receipt dataclass recording how the min-cluster floor was consumed: floor value, cluster counts before/after, and split decisions.

nodes.name: build_irene_pass1_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs and compiles the Irene Pass-1 9-node LangGraph StateGraph with the scaffold transitions and gate-decision interrupt.

nodes.name: _parse_operator_instructions_envelope
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the operator-instructions envelope payload delivered to Kim, raising OperatorInstructionsParseError with detail on malformed input.

nodes.name: build_kim_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs and compiles Kim's 9-node LangGraph StateGraph with the scaffold transitions and gate-decision interrupt.

nodes.languageNotes: Loads the skill script via importlib.util.spec_from_file_location rather than a package import, keeping the skills tree decoupled from the app package.

nodes.summary: Motion-planner consumed-payload contract: frozen set of envelope keys (upstream_output, authorized_storyboard, motion_designations, perception_artifacts, bundle_path) validated by the Ratchet-D manifest-edge test for the 07D.5 dependency edge.

nodes.summary: Decodes and validates Kira's JSON envelope payload against the consumed-payload contract, raising KiraActError on malformed input.

nodes.name: _load_motion_plan
nodes.summary: Resolves the motion plan from the payload's explicit motion_plan dict, a motion_plan_path YAML file, or the legacy top-level slides list, in that priority order.

nodes.summary: Main motion-generation loop: iterates the plan's slides sequentially, checks the budget, calls Kling per slide, records per-slide receipts, video URLs, and inspection notes under the run bundle's motion directory.

nodes.name: build_compositor_invocation
nodes.summary: Builds the downstream compositor invocation record pointing at the generated motion assets.

nodes.name: act

nodes.summary: Dispatches motion generation: returns the deterministic fixture MP4 when no runtime motion-plan context is provided, otherwise loads and runs the kling-video skill's real generation backend for the given slide, wrapping failures in KlingDispatchError.

nodes.name: _project_slides

nodes.name: narration_join.py
nodes.summary: Single canonical home of the narration join policy (narration_script joined with segment-manifest deltas by segment id) shared by the storyboard-B publisher, Enrique's audio synthesis, and Quinn-R's G5 pre-composition QA so all three validate the same join. Pure functions with no I/O; starvation handling is left to callers.
nodes.languageNotes: An import-identity pin enforces that all three consumers route through this module rather than re-implementing the join.

nodes.name: join_narration_segments
nodes.summary: Joins Pass-2 narration script rows with segment-manifest deltas by segment id, resolving each row's slide_id from the first non-empty visual_reference perception source.

nodes.name: phantom_segment_ids
nodes.summary: Returns segment ids present in the joined rows that have no narration text, flagging phantom segments for caller-side starvation handling.

nodes.name: collapsed_segment_ids
nodes.summary: Identifies segment ids whose join collapsed multiple deltas into one row, so callers can detect lost granularity in the narration-to-slide mapping.

nodes.name: _act.py

nodes.languageNotes: Carries a LOC-budget guard; the consumed-payload contract deliberately lives in payload_contract.py to keep this module lean.

nodes.name: run_g5_checks
nodes.summary: Runs the G5 pre-composition quality-control battery over the payload, including grounding validation and deterministic narration-to-perception fidelity detection.

nodes.name: act

nodes.summary: Classifies a narration text span as fidelity-bearing (references visuals or figures) or non-visual.

nodes.summary: Cross-checks narration segments against perception artifacts, emitting tagged findings for orphan visual references and figure contradictions.

nodes.name: _artifact_map
nodes.summary: Builds a slide-id keyed map of validated PerceptionArtifact objects from raw perception payloads, asserting each artifact was genuinely perceived.

nodes.languageNotes: Uses LangGraph interrupt/Command for the human gate decision and reuses the sanctum-lock helpers pattern shared across specialist graphs.

nodes.name: _assemble_quinn_r_prompt
nodes.summary: Assembles the Quinn-R review prompt from the envelope payload, deterministic check results, and perception context.

nodes.name: _parse_qrr
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the LLM's quality-review-result JSON, raising QRRParseError with a bounded raw excerpt on malformed output.

nodes.name: _invoke_quinn_r_llm
nodes.summary: Invokes the resolved chat model with the assembled Quinn-R prompt and records the model-resolution trail entry.

nodes.name: _act_postcomposition
nodes.summary: Post-composition act path: runs postcomposition validators over the composed artifact and merges results into the run state.

nodes.name: build_quinn_r_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs and compiles the 9-node Quinn-R StateGraph wiring the scaffold transitions from START to END.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Declares CONSUMED_PAYLOAD_KEYS — every envelope-payload key Quinn-R's act body reads — so the Ratchet-D manifest lockstep test can assert dependency edges use only declared vocabulary, preventing the Trial-3 fork where 07B emitted keys the act body never read.
nodes.languageNotes: Kept out of _act.py because the act body carries a LOC-budget guard; the contract is import surface, not act logic.

nodes.name: quality_control_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Importlib-based dispatch wrapper that loads the quality-control skill scripts (outside the package tree) and exposes G5 grounding, storyboard-B review, and pre/post-composition validator entry points with dual-based content-error taxonomy.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses importlib.util plus synthetic sys.modules package stubs to load skill scripts from skills/quality-control/scripts without a package install.

nodes.name: run_g5_grounding
nodes.summary: Runs the G5 grounding check via the dynamically loaded quality-control script, translating content failures into the tagged dual-based error taxonomy.

nodes.name: run_storyboard_b_review
nodes.summary: Dispatches the storyboard-B review check over the payload, validating inputs and raising StoryboardBInputError on malformed review material.

nodes.name: run_precomposition_validators
nodes.summary: Loads and executes the pre-composition validator scripts against the given artifact paths, aggregating findings.

nodes.name: run_postcomposition_validators
nodes.summary: Loads and executes the post-composition validator scripts against a composed artifact path, aggregating findings.

nodes.name: sensory_bridges_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Importlib dispatch wrapper giving Quinn-R access to the sensory-bridges perceive callable in skills/sensory-bridges, wrapping failures in SensoryBridgeDispatchError (a SpecialistDispatchError subtype).

nodes.name: dispatch_to_sensory_bridges
nodes.summary: Invokes the dynamically loaded sensory-bridges perceive callable for an artifact path and modality, optionally allowing fixture fallback, and normalizes errors to the typed dispatch taxonomy.

nodes.name: source_bundle.py
nodes.summary: Shared fail-loud reader that extracts corpus content for planner prompts; raises SourceBundleError (a SpecialistDispatchError) when extracted source text is absent, enforcing the S0 policy that missing source is a contract violation, never a planning license.
nodes.languageNotes: Born from the Trial-3 cycle-2 root cause where planner LLMs confabulated a lesson plan after receiving only bundle metadata instead of extracted corpus text.

nodes.name: read_extracted_source
nodes.summary: Reads and returns the extracted corpus text referenced by the payload, raising SourceBundleError if the bundle path or extracted content is missing or empty.

nodes.name: _parse_operator_instructions_envelope

nodes.summary: Loads the required retrieval-bundle artifacts from the bundle directory, raising BundleParseError when required YAML/JSON outputs are missing or malformed.

nodes.name: _refresh_manifest
nodes.summary: Recomputes sha256 digests for bundle files and rewrites the bundle manifest stamped with the run id.

nodes.name: _harden_bundle
nodes.summary: Hardens the retrieval bundle: validates the directive against bundle contents, enforces word floors and cross-validation hints, anchors claims, and refreshes the integrity manifest.

nodes.summary: Batch-mode act path: runs vision perception through the OpenAI batch route for all slides and materializes the resulting artifacts under the runs root.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Vision act entry point: resolves the execution mode (realtime vs batch), perceives every slide row into a validated PerceptionArtifact, and records coverage and the dispatch trail.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Vision specialist LangGraph: standard 9-node scaffold that delegates its act node to the vision _act implementation and enforces the consumed-payload contract, with a gate-decision interrupt.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Vision specialist contracts: declares the CONSUMED_PAYLOAD_KEYS vocabulary and the Pydantic VisionProviderResponse model that the multimodal provider's JSON output must satisfy, with a closed-enum validator on image role tiers.

nodes.name: VisionProviderResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for the vision provider's JSON response — visual elements, confidence, coverage, and provenance fields — with a field validator ensuring role-tier values stay within the closed enum.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Pydantic v2 ConfigDict and field_validator; the closed-enum rejection follows the repo's triple-layer red-rejection idiom.

nodes.name: provider.py
nodes.summary: Live multimodal vision perceiver: base64-encodes a slide PNG into an image_url content block, calls the house chat-model adapter with a perception prompt demanding the VisionProviderResponse JSON shape, parses and validates the reply with bounded in-call retry, and maps SDK exceptions onto tagged VisionProviderError/VisionProviderTimeout types.
nodes.languageNotes: Bbox coordinates are approximate normalized [x1,y1,x2,y2] estimates; downstream reading-path classification only buckets centers into thirds, so coarse precision is by design. Supports prompt-cache key derivation via the llm_batch prompt_cache helpers.

nodes.name: _perception_prompt
nodes.summary: Builds the perception prompt instructing the multimodal model to emit the VisionProviderResponse JSON shape for a given slide id.

nodes.name: build_perception_openai_messages
nodes.summary: Builds the OpenAI-format message list embedding the base64-encoded PNG as an image_url content block alongside the perception prompt.

nodes.name: _parse_response
nodes.summary: Strips and parses the raw model reply into a validated VisionProviderResponse, attaching slide id, model id, and source PNG provenance.

nodes.name: _map_sdk_exception
nodes.summary: Maps OpenAI SDK exceptions onto the existing tagged VisionProviderError/VisionProviderTimeout taxonomy so retryability classification stays stable.

nodes.name: perceive_png
nodes.summary: Main perception entry point: invokes the multimodal model on a PNG with timeout, retries malformed JSON up to three times in-call, applies prompt-cache extra-body when configured, and returns a validated provider response.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Generated 9-node scaffold LangGraph for specialist Vyx: parses operator-instructions envelopes and assembles storyboard instructions in its act node, following the standard receive-through-handoff transition chain with a gate-decision interrupt.

nodes.name: build_workbook_producer_graph
nodes.summary: Constructs and compiles the 9-node workbook-producer StateGraph wiring the scaffold transitions from START to END.

nodes.name: parity.py
nodes.summary: Shared styleguide-resolution parity core (canonical-arc S3): pure functions computing the sha256-over-canonical-JSON resolution digest used identically by CD's emission and Gary's shadow comparator, plus a total never-raise comparator classifying CD's authoring-time resolution against Gary's dispatch-time view into ok / expected-ordering-gap / divergence.
nodes.languageNotes: The comparator is deliberately total: any internal crash is converted into a bounded crash-detail receipt rather than raising, so parity instrumentation can never break dispatch.

nodes.name: canonical_resolution_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the sha256 digest over the canonical JSON serialization of a resolved styleguide mapping, shared byte-for-byte by CD emission and Gary's shadow comparison.

nodes.name: compare_styleguide_resolution
nodes.summary: Total comparator entry point that classifies CD's styleguide_resolution block against Gary's dispatch-time view and returns a structured parity receipt, never raising.

nodes.name: _classify
nodes.summary: Core classification logic mapping the CD block and Gary view onto the ratified trichotomy (ok / expected-ordering-gap / divergence) by comparing statuses, digests, and bound-guide name-digest pairs.

nodes.name: resolver.py
nodes.summary: CD-owned Gamma styleguide library loader and resolver — the single source of truth re-homed from Gary's module so CD, Gary, and the Marcus orchestrator can all import the resolution core. Loads state/config/gamma-style-guides.yaml and expands named styleguide records into the flat base-layer API keys Gary consumes, covering classic API, Studio, and scripted production modes.
nodes.languageNotes: Strangler-fig extraction: gary/styleguide_library.py is now a thin byte-compatible re-export of this neutral module. Pure functions with no run-state and no I/O beyond the YAML read.

nodes.name: load_style_guides
nodes.summary: Loads and structurally validates the gamma-style-guides YAML into a mapping of named styleguide records, raising StyleguideError on malformed content.

nodes.name: classic_surface_keys
nodes.summary: Returns the classic-API surface keys present on a styleguide record, used to determine which base-layer settings a guide binds.

nodes.name: _expand_api
nodes.summary: Expands a classic (API production-mode) styleguide record into the flat base-layer Gamma API keys, validating field presence and shape.

nodes.name: _expand_studio
nodes.summary: Expands a Studio production-mode styleguide record into its resolved settings, validating the Studio-specific field set.

nodes.name: expand_record
nodes.summary: Dispatches record expansion to the API or Studio expander based on the record's production mode.

nodes.name: scripted_entries
nodes.summary: Returns the scripted-mode entries declared on a styleguide record.

nodes.name: resolve_scripted
nodes.summary: Resolves a scripted styleguide entry by class name from a record, validating that the requested class exists.

nodes.name: resolve_styleguide
nodes.summary: Top-level resolution entry point: looks up a named guide in the loaded library (loading from path if needed) and returns its expanded base-layer settings.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel package initializer re-exporting the entire course-source substrate surface: asset records, canonical processed-source validation, input bundles, manifest scanning/drift, SME registry, and syllabus metadata.
nodes.languageNotes: Python package barrel using explicit __all__ re-exports to pin the public course-source API.

nodes.name: asset_records.py
nodes.summary: Defines CanonicalAssetRecord and its Pydantic supporting shapes (AssetKind, status, source-ref roles) plus factory helpers that mint syllabus-requirement, lesson-LO, and requirement-gap records for course source assets.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Pydantic v2 model_validator(mode="after") to enforce that source-grounded records carry a content source-ref, and StrEnum closed sets for kinds/statuses.

nodes.name: CanonicalAssetRecord
nodes.summary: Canonical Pydantic record for a course asset, binding asset kind, status, source refs, learning-objective refs, and review metadata with a validator requiring content refs on source-grounded records.

nodes.name: make_syllabus_requirement_record
nodes.summary: Factory that mints a CanonicalAssetRecord representing a syllabus-declared requirement, wiring the source ref and optional module/lesson scoping.

nodes.name: make_lesson_lo_record
nodes.summary: Factory that mints a lesson-scoped learning-objective asset record with LO references and optional source refs.

nodes.name: emit_requirement_gap_records
nodes.summary: Emits gap-status asset records for a required asset kind when source refs are missing, feeding the gap-ledger flow.

nodes.name: input_bundle.py
nodes.summary: Builds the LessonPlanningInputBundle — the typed YAML bundle handed to lesson planning — by composing course/module profiles, a module-scoped source manifest, SME styleguide resolution, and asset records from a module metadata proposal.

nodes.name: LessonPlanningInputBundle
nodes.summary: Top-level Pydantic bundle carrying course/module planning profiles, scoped manifest entries, styleguide resolution, and asset records, with a validator enforcing the scope-and-gap contract.

nodes.name: _module_profile
nodes.summary: Derives a ModulePlanningProfile from the course root and the module entry inside the metadata proposal.

nodes.name: _scoped_manifest
nodes.summary: Runs the deterministic course scan and filters manifest entries down to those relevant to the requested module scope.

nodes.name: _styleguide_resolution
nodes.summary: Resolves the SME profile via the SME registry into a StyleguideResolution, surfacing marked gaps for unbound SMEs instead of silently defaulting.

nodes.name: _asset_records_from_module_proposal
nodes.summary: Converts the module metadata proposal into canonical asset records, including requirement-gap records for missing sources.

nodes.name: build_lesson_planning_input_bundle
nodes.summary: Main entry point assembling the complete lesson-planning input bundle from course root, proposal path, module id, and optional operator focus.

nodes.name: manifest_drift.py
nodes.summary: Detects drift between a stored course-source manifest snapshot and a freshly rescanned manifest, returning a unified-diff-backed ManifestDriftResult.

nodes.name: _reproducible_snapshot_text
nodes.summary: Normalizes manifest YAML text into a reproducible form (stripping volatile fields) so snapshot comparison is stable.

nodes.name: check_manifest_snapshot
nodes.summary: Rescans the course, renders the manifest, and diffs it against the stored snapshot file, returning a ManifestDriftResult with any diff lines.

nodes.name: manifest_scan.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic course-source scanner that walks git-tracked corpus files, classifies each by scope/role/module/lesson, and produces the source manifest plus a gap ledger of missing required material.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses git ls-files subprocess calls to enumerate tracked vs ignored paths so the scan is reproducible from repository state rather than raw directory listings.

nodes.name: _git_paths
nodes.summary: Invokes git ls-files under the course root to enumerate tracked or ignored paths, forming the deterministic file universe for the scan.

nodes.name: _scope_for
nodes.summary: Classifies a relative corpus path into course/shared/module/lesson scope based on its directory shape.

nodes.name: _file_entries
nodes.summary: Builds typed SourceManifestEntry records for every tracked file, attaching scope, role, module/lesson ids, and git status.

nodes.name: _has_non_scaffold_file
nodes.summary: Checks whether a directory contains at least one real (non-scaffold, non-ignored) source file.

nodes.name: _gaps
nodes.summary: Core gap analyzer comparing declared course/module/lesson expectations against scanned entries to emit GapEntry records for missing syllabus, module, and lesson material.

nodes.name: scan_course
nodes.summary: Public entry point: loads the course record, enumerates files, and returns a CourseSourceScan bundling the SourceManifest and GapLedger.

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic record family for course-source ingestion planning: course/module/SME records, source manifest entries, and the gap ledger, all pinned to schema version 0.1.
nodes.languageNotes: All models use ConfigDict(extra="forbid")-style strictness with Literal closed sets for scope and git status, plus a pinned schema_version field validator.

nodes.name: CourseRecord
nodes.summary: Top-level course declaration record binding course details, SME, runtime contract, modules, and source availability, with a pinned schema-version validator.

nodes.name: SourceManifest
nodes.summary: Container model for the deterministic list of SourceManifestEntry records produced by scan_course.

nodes.name: GapLedger
nodes.summary: Container model aggregating GapEntry records that describe missing required course material.

nodes.name: registry.py
nodes.summary: Tiny loader that reads and validates a course.yaml container declaration from a course root into a CourseRecord.

nodes.name: load_course
nodes.summary: Loads course.yaml from the course root and validates it into a CourseRecord, failing loudly when the file is absent.

nodes.name: sme_registry.py
nodes.summary: Per-SME voice/styleguide/attribution resolution layer over state/config/sme-registry.yaml; unknown SME keys hard-fail and unbound SMEs return marked gaps rather than silently inheriting another styleguide.
nodes.languageNotes: Registry loading is lru_cache-memoized with an explicit clear_sme_registry_cache escape hatch for tests.

nodes.name: SmeProfile
nodes.summary: Pydantic profile for one SME: display name, voice/styleguide bindings, attribution, and approval fields with non-empty validation.

nodes.name: load_sme_registry
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the SME registry YAML into an SmeRegistry model, memoized per path.

nodes.name: resolve_sme_key
nodes.summary: Resolves a free-form SME name or key to a canonical registry key, hard-failing on unknown SMEs with the available key set in the error.

nodes.name: resolve_sme_profile
nodes.summary: Resolves an SME name to its full profile, returning marked gap fields for unbound SMEs so callers never silently fall back to a default styleguide.

nodes.name: profiles_diverge
nodes.summary: Field-by-field comparison of two SME profiles reporting which binding fields diverge.

nodes.name: syllabus_metadata.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic syllabus readers (DOCX and MHTML) plus proposal builders that extract course title, learner profile, objectives, and per-module metadata into anchored, source-traceable ModuleMetadataProposal records.
nodes.languageNotes: Every extracted string is wrapped as AnchoredText with a SourceAnchor (path + locator) so downstream proposals stay provenance-traceable; includes mojibake detection on extracted text.

nodes.name: ModuleMetadataProposal
nodes.summary: Pydantic proposal for one module's metadata (title, objectives, suggestions) with a validator requiring source anchors on all proposed records.

nodes.name: _HtmlTableParser
nodes.summary: Minimal HTMLParser subclass that collects table cell text from MHTML syllabus exports for table-driven objective extraction.

nodes.name: read_docx_syllabus
nodes.summary: Reads a .docx syllabus via python-docx into an ExtractedSyllabusDocument of anchored paragraphs and tables.

nodes.name: read_mhtml_syllabus
nodes.summary: Parses an MHTML syllabus export using the email MIME parser and the HTML table parser into an anchored document.

nodes.name: _bucket_suggestions
nodes.summary: Classifies syllabus table row cells into metadata suggestion buckets (readings, activities, etc.) keyed by header labels, preserving source anchors.

nodes.name: _docx_modules
nodes.summary: Extracts per-module titles, objectives, and suggestions from DOCX paragraph structure for the expected module id list.

nodes.name: _mhtml_modules
nodes.summary: Extracts per-module metadata from MHTML table rows, reconciling header layouts and emitting missing-module placeholders when rows are absent.

nodes.name: build_module_metadata_proposal
nodes.summary: Convenience entry point: loads the course record, reads the syllabus file by extension, and delegates to the document-based proposal builder.

nodes.name: build_module_metadata_proposal_from_document
nodes.summary: Builds the full CourseMetadataProposal from an extracted syllabus document, validating expected objective counts and required titles against course.yaml.

nodes.name: prose_uplift.py
nodes.summary: SME-aware workbook prose revoicer that strips REVOICE scaffold markers, rewrites deixis ('this slide' style references), stamps SME attribution from the registry, and measures the before/after delta; idempotent on a second pass.

nodes.name: ProseUpliftDelta
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing measurable prose-uplift results (revoice markers cleared, deixis reduced) with a to_dict serialization for audit reporting.

nodes.name: measure_prose_delta
nodes.summary: Computes a ProseUpliftDelta by comparing revoice-marker and deixis counts between original and uplifted text.

nodes.name: uplift_narration_text
nodes.summary: Core uplift transform: strips scaffold markers and rewrites deictic references in narration text to produce learner-ready workbook prose.

nodes.name: sme_aware_prose_revoicer
nodes.summary: Builds a prose revoicer callable that resolves the SME profile from the registry and applies attribution-aware uplift, for injection into the workbook producer.

nodes.name: chooser_html_emitter.py
nodes.summary: Renders the static, dependency-free per-slide Storyboard-A 'chooser' HTML page for Section 07C that a client opens on gh-pages, with a Playwright-stable DOM contract for picking variants and copying an SBA selection code.
nodes.languageNotes: Emits a single self-contained HTML document with pinned data-attribute selectors so an external Playwright driver stays deterministic.

nodes.name: _card
nodes.summary: Renders one variant card's HTML fragment with the Playwright-stable data-slide/data-variant attributes.

nodes.name: _row
nodes.summary: Renders a per-slide row pairing the A and B variant cards for side-by-side comparison.

nodes.name: _script
nodes.summary: Emits the inline JavaScript that tracks per-slide variant selections and builds the copyable SBA-{run_tag} selection code when the operator finalizes.

nodes.name: render_chooser_html
nodes.summary: Public entry point assembling the full chooser HTML document (rows, styles, and finalize script) for a run's per-slide variant options.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: App-namespace Marcus compatibility surface: a tiny barrel re-exporting get_facade so callers import the single Marcus facade from app.marcus.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel for the Marcus CLI bridge: re-exports the ad-hoc ask, gate verdict/override, and trial-launch helpers as the package's public surface.

nodes.name: __main__.py
nodes.summary: python -m app.marcus.cli entry point: builds the top-level argparse tree aggregating trial (start/resume/recover/batch), gate, ad-hoc ask, plan-dialogue, and plan-ratify subcommands.

nodes.name: build_parser
nodes.summary: Assembles the top-level ArgumentParser by delegating each subcommand's flags to its module's parser builder.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses argv and dispatches to the matching subcommand CLI handler, returning its exit code.

nodes.name: adhoc_cli.py
nodes.summary: CLI bridge for one-shot Marcus ad-hoc asks: loads env, optionally overrides the cascade tier, and routes the question through the Marcus facade.

nodes.name: _parse_cascade_override
nodes.summary: Normalizes and validates an optional cascade-tier override string via normalize_agent_name before it reaches the facade.

nodes.name: run_adhoc_ask
nodes.summary: Programmatic entry: obtains the Marcus facade and issues a single ask, returning the structured response payload.

nodes.name: adhoc_ask_cli
nodes.summary: argparse-facing handler for the ad-hoc ask subcommand: wires flags to run_adhoc_ask and prints the JSON result.

nodes.name: capability_grounding.py
nodes.summary: Marcus's 'honesty spine' for the S5 interlocutor: builds a pure, deterministic grounding context from the S4 capability overlay so Marcus answers capability questions from the real dispatch graph, surfacing runtime-precondition blocks and stale-overlay disclosure.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately pure (no model or network calls): staleness and precondition facts are injected by the interactive entrypoint, keeping the module fully unit-testable offline.

nodes.name: RuntimePrecondition
nodes.summary: Model of a runtime blocker (e.g., missing scite OAuth token) that keeps a wired capability from actually running right now.

nodes.name: CapabilityFact
nodes.summary: One specialist's capability fact (state, rationale, routed nodes) with an honest_summary rendering that never up-levels the state.

nodes.name: GroundingContext
nodes.summary: The assembled fact map Marcus's LLM context is anchored on: per-specialist lookup plus a render method producing the deterministic context block.

nodes.name: load_overlay
nodes.summary: Loads the S4-generated capability-overlay YAML mapping from disk.

nodes.name: research_token_precondition
nodes.summary: Derives the live-research RuntimePrecondition from actual scite credential presence so 'wired but blocked pending the research token' is disclosed honestly.

nodes.name: build_grounding_context
nodes.summary: Pure assembler combining the loaded overlay, injected precondition facts, and a stale flag into a deterministic GroundingContext.

nodes.name: front_door.py
nodes.summary: Marcus-SPOC front door (S5): the first conversational turn that presents the curated 3-bundle catalog with honest readiness from bundle_readiness and only returns a FrontDoorSelection on the operator's explicit, confirmed pick — an LLM recommendation is advisory only and unknown bundle ids raise before any selection.
nodes.languageNotes: IO seams (input/output callables) are constructor-injected so offline acceptance tests script the operator turn deterministically.

nodes.name: present_catalog
nodes.summary: Builds the BundleOption list from the bundle catalog, attaching per-bundle readiness verdicts so unproven bundles are flagged rather than hidden.

nodes.name: render_catalog
nodes.summary: Renders the presented catalog as operator-facing text with readiness flags per bundle.

nodes.name: front_door_select
nodes.summary: The deterministic selection guard: validates the operator's pick against the catalog, rejects unknown or non-runnable bundles, requires explicit confirmation, and yields a FrontDoorSelection.

nodes.name: run_front_door
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full front-door turn: present catalog, surface any advisory recommendation, collect and confirm the operator pick, and return the ComponentSelection plus seeds for start_trial.

nodes.name: gate_cli.py
nodes.summary: CLI bridge for the gate verdict and override flow: validates an OperatorVerdict, resumes the paused run via the resume API, and submits/applies cache-aware overrides through the override API.

nodes.name: run_gate_decide
nodes.summary: Validates a verdict payload into OperatorVerdict, resolves the resume command via resume_from_verdict, and wraps it in a CLI transport response.

nodes.name: run_override_submit
nodes.summary: Submits an operator override request through the override API, returning the cache-impact preview and confirm token.

nodes.name: run_override_apply
nodes.summary: Applies a previously submitted override using its confirm token, surfacing stale-token failures as structured errors.

nodes.name: build_parser
nodes.summary: Builds the argparse subtree for gate-decide, override-submit, and override-apply subcommands.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point parsing argv and dispatching to the selected gate/override CLI handler.

nodes.name: _shim_parser.py
nodes.summary: Shared argparse factory for the A2 single-decision gate shims (Story 7a.7): single source of truth for the shim parser shape with the pinned four-section OPERATOR/INPUTS/OUTPUTS/REFERENCE help text.
nodes.languageNotes: Help-text section headers and 8-char underlines are exact-match pinned for grep stability (NFR-OD1).

nodes.name: build_shim_parser
nodes.summary: Constructs the gate-agnostic shim ArgumentParser (verdict file, trial id, runs root) parameterized by gate id, keeping each per-gate shim under 80 lines.

nodes.name: g1_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for terminal gate G1: loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file, validates it, and resumes the paused production trial at G1.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Reads and validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict, then drives resume_production_trial for gate G1, printing structured errors to stderr on failure.

nodes.name: g2b_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for the G2B variant-pick pause point (woken at Arc 2): loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for the G2B pause, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: g2c_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for gate G2C: loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial at that gate.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for gate G2C, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: g3_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for gate G3: loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial at that gate.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for gate G3, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: g4_shim.py
nodes.summary: A2 single-decision shim for gate G4: loads an OperatorVerdict JSON file and resumes the paused production trial at that gate.

nodes.name: shim_main
nodes.summary: Validates the verdict file into an OperatorVerdict and drives resume_production_trial for gate G4, with fail-loud error reporting.

nodes.name: g4a_shim.py
