nodes.summary: Package barrel re-exporting the Lesson Plan public surface from Stories 31-1/31-2/31-3: schema shapes (LessonPlan, PlanUnit, FitReport), the append-only log, digest helpers, registries, the Gagne diagnostician, and the Quinn-R gate.

nodes.name: blueprint_coauthor.py
nodes.summary: Irene blueprint co-author protocol (Story 29-3): consumes a 31-4 blueprint draft, records Irene plus writer approval in a deterministic sidecar artifact, and returns an updated PlanUnit carrying a typed blueprint_signoff pointer.

nodes.name: _load_blueprint_markdown
nodes.summary: Loads the 31-4 blueprint draft markdown and validates it against the plan unit and asset contract.

nodes.name: compose_blueprint_signoff_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders the deterministic Irene plus writer sign-off sidecar markdown.

nodes.name: coauthor_blueprint
nodes.summary: Validates the blueprint plan unit, writes the sign-off sidecar artifact, and returns an updated PlanUnit with a typed blueprint_signoff pointer.

nodes.name: blueprint_producer.py
nodes.summary: First concrete ModalityProducer implementation (Story 31-4): emits a deterministic offline markdown blueprint draft with the stable human-review markers required downstream and returns a valid ProducedAsset.

nodes.name: _validate_blueprint_target
nodes.summary: Rejects plan units that are not valid blueprint targets before production.

nodes.name: render_blueprint_body
nodes.summary: Deterministic offline renderer for the blueprint draft body; callers may inject a richer renderer.

nodes.name: compose_blueprint_markdown
nodes.summary: Wraps the rendered body with headers and the stable human-review checkpoint markers.

nodes.name: BlueprintProducer
nodes.summary: Concrete ModalityProducer for the blueprint modality: produces the markdown draft artifact and returns a ProducedAsset fulfilling the plan unit.

nodes.name: collateral_spec.py
nodes.summary: CollateralSpec Pydantic content-model family (Braid S1 DP4), the single source of truth the workbook producer builds from: workbook sections with mandatory learning-objective bindings, depth-delta contracts, exercises, and research enrichment goals.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy Pydantic v2 model_validator/field_validator use with open-ID regex validation enforced across the whole family.

nodes.name: DepthDeltaContract
nodes.summary: Contract declaring what depth is deferred off the glance-slide into the workbook versus retained on-slide.

nodes.name: Exercise
nodes.summary: Workbook exercise model with open-ID validation, Bloom level, prompt intent, and answer-key source-reference shape checks.

nodes.name: WorkbookSection
nodes.summary: Workbook section binding a mandatory learning_objective_id with depth-delta contract, exercises, and narrative intent.

nodes.name: WorkbookSpec
nodes.summary: Top-level workbook spec: closed kind discriminant plus ordered sections.

nodes.name: ResearchEnrichmentGoal
nodes.summary: Pedagogical-intent research goal bound to an objective id; rejects raw fetch-query phrasing.

nodes.name: CollateralSpec
nodes.summary: Root collateral spec carried on the Irene Pass-1 lesson_plan collateral key; discriminant-validated container for the workbook payload and research goals.

nodes.name: component_type_registry.py
nodes.summary: Closed-set N=2 component-type registry (Story 31-3): narrated-deck and motion-enabled-narrated-lesson packages composed from atomic modalities, with every modality_ref validated against MODALITY_REGISTRY; widening requires a schema-version bump.

nodes.name: ComponentTypeEntry
nodes.summary: Registry entry composing atomic modality refs into a component package; model validator requires every modality_ref to be registered.

nodes.name: get_component_type_entry
nodes.summary: Looks up a component-type entry by ref with an explicit unknown-ref error.

nodes.name: coverage_manifest.py
nodes.summary: Coverage-manifest verifier (Story 32-2): audits that every lesson-plan envelope surface in the 05-to-13 path preserves lesson_plan_revision plus lesson_plan_digest and gates live consumers with assert_plan_fresh, emitting one canonical JSON manifest artifact consumed by 32-3.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Python's ast module to statically verify that consumer entry paths call assert_plan_fresh canonically.

nodes.name: CoverageSurface
nodes.summary: Per-surface audit record: step id, module path, plan-ref mode, and revision/digest presence flags.

nodes.name: CoverageSummary
nodes.summary: Aggregate counts across audited surfaces including the trial_ready verdict.

nodes.name: CoverageManifest
nodes.summary: Canonical manifest artifact shape with schema version and timezone-aware generated_at validation.

nodes.name: CoverageInventoryEntry
nodes.summary: Story-owned inventory row declaring an expected downstream envelope surface to audit.

nodes.name: verify_plan_ref_fields
nodes.summary: Checks a surface preserves lesson_plan_revision and lesson_plan_digest per its plan-ref mode.

nodes.name: verify_assert_plan_fresh_usage
nodes.summary: AST-based verification that a consumer module live entry path calls assert_plan_fresh canonically (direct or via a live wrapper).

nodes.name: summarize_surfaces
nodes.summary: Folds per-surface audit results into a CoverageSummary.

nodes.name: build_coverage_manifest
nodes.summary: Runs the full audit over the story-owned inventory and assembles the CoverageManifest.

nodes.name: emit_coverage_manifest
nodes.summary: Builds and writes the canonical coverage-manifest JSON artifact consumed by Story 32-3.

nodes.name: digest.py
nodes.summary: Canonical-JSON sha256 digest helpers for LessonPlan (Story 31-1): compute_digest hashes the canonical serialization with the digest field cleared, and assert_digest_matches enforces plan integrity.

nodes.name: compute_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the sha256 of the canonical-JSON serialization of a LessonPlan with its digest field cleared.

nodes.name: assert_digest_matches
nodes.summary: Raises if a plan stored digest does not match its recomputed canonical digest.

nodes.name: drill_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Projects frozen G0 enrichment cards into DrillSpec inputs (Mine 5): read-only card consumption with no network or model calls, import-linter Contract M3 safe (no orchestrator imports).

nodes.name: DrillEnrichmentProjection
nodes.summary: Projection result dataclass: DrillSpec plus warnings and an empty-source flag.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_drill_inputs
nodes.summary: Read-only projection of a frozen G0 enrichment card into DrillSpec inputs with defensive id sanitization and warning collection.

nodes.name: drill_producer.py
nodes.summary: Renders a DrillSpec into a Markdown drill artifact (Mine 5): short LO-linked practice items only, with no REVOICE, DOCX, or depth-delta machinery.

nodes.name: render_drill_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders a DrillSpec into the drill Markdown artifact body.

nodes.name: write_drill_artifact
nodes.summary: Writes the rendered drill markdown to the output path.

nodes.name: drill_spec.py
nodes.summary: Drill collateral Pydantic content model (Mine 5): a DrillSpec of LO-linked short practice items with source references, a deliberately distinct artifact family from WorkbookSpec.

nodes.name: DrillSourceRef
nodes.summary: Source citation for a practice item: ref_id, locator, and excerpt.

nodes.name: DrillPracticeItem
nodes.summary: LO-linked short practice item with prompt, expected focus, and source refs; non-whitespace validation.

nodes.name: DrillSpec
nodes.summary: Root drill spec: closed kind discriminant, non-empty title, and ordered practice items.

nodes.name: event_type_registry.py
nodes.summary: Event-type registry and open-string validator (Story 31-1): the nine Gagne-9 plan-unit event labels plus reserved log event types; validate_event_type warns on unknown-but-well-formed types and rejects invalid strings.

nodes.name: validate_event_type
nodes.summary: Warns once per unknown-but-well-formed event type and rejects strings failing the open-id regex.

nodes.name: events.py
nodes.summary: Event primitives for the Lesson Plan log (Story 31-1): the generic EventEnvelope shape every 31-2 log event conforms to, plus ScopeDecisionTransition as the first concrete payload with a two-level actor surface.

nodes.name: EventEnvelope
nodes.summary: Generic envelope every Lesson Plan log event conforms to: UUID4 event_id, timezone-aware timestamp, plan_revision, event_type, and payload.

nodes.name: ScopeDecisionTransition
nodes.summary: First concrete log payload: a scope-decision state transition with two-level actor surface and an audit dump method.

nodes.name: to_internal_actor
nodes.summary: Maps an operator-facing actor plus optional hint onto the internal actor vocabulary.

nodes.name: fit_report.py
nodes.summary: Fit-report-v1 validator, canonical-JSON serializer, and emission wiring (Story 29-1); Marcus-Orchestrator is the sole canonical caller of emit_fit_report against the 31-2 log, and the FitReport shapes themselves are re-exported from the 31-1 schema.

nodes.name: validate_fit_report
nodes.summary: Validates a FitReport against the live plan: revision freshness (StaleFitReportError) and unit-id existence (UnknownUnitIdError) checks.

nodes.name: serialize_fit_report
nodes.summary: Produces the canonical-JSON serialization of a FitReport.

nodes.name: deserialize_fit_report
nodes.summary: Parses canonical JSON back into a FitReport instance.

nodes.name: emit_fit_report
nodes.summary: Marcus-Orchestrator-only emission wiring: validates the report then appends the fit-report event to the Lesson Plan log.

nodes.name: gagne_diagnostician.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic Gagne-9 diagnostician (Story 29-2): Irene-authored behavior that constructs and validates FitReport material per plan unit — fitness derivation, recommended scope decisions, weather bands, and commentary — without ever writing the log itself.

nodes.name: PriorDeclinedRationale
nodes.summary: Verbatim declined rationale carried forward per unit for the next diagnostic pass.

nodes.name: _derive_fitness
nodes.summary: Derives a unit modality fitness from its event type, registry validity, and any prior declined rationale.

nodes.name: _format_commentary
nodes.summary: Formats the human-readable diagnostic commentary with a summary-only fallback mode.

nodes.name: diagnose_plan_unit
nodes.summary: Diagnoses one plan unit: fitness, recommended scope decision, weather band, and commentary.

nodes.name: diagnose_lesson_plan
nodes.summary: Diagnoses the whole plan with budget-aware summary fallback and duplicate-target rejection, producing FitReport input material.

nodes.name: glossary_projection.py
nodes.summary: Projects tier-labeled research-packet rows into encyclopedia glossary articles (W2) at produce time: default projector builds non-vacuous stubs from row metadata, with an injectable writer and a Markdown renderer; M3-safe (imports research_packet, never the orchestrator).

nodes.name: GlossaryArticleBrief
nodes.summary: Brief for one glossary article: term, headline, body, and tier-labeled source metadata.

nodes.name: default_glossary_writer
nodes.summary: Default projector building a non-vacuous encyclopedia stub from research-row metadata without inventing scholarship.

nodes.name: project_glossary_articles
nodes.summary: Projects research-packet rows into glossary article briefs via an injectable writer, capped at max_articles.

nodes.name: glossary_inputs_from_run
nodes.summary: Loads a run directory research packet and projects glossary inputs from it.

nodes.name: render_glossary_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders glossary articles, or an explicit empty-reason stub, to Markdown.

nodes.name: learning_objective_adapters.py
nodes.summary: Pure adapter functions bridging the canonical LearningObjective entity to three legacy representations (Irene statements, workbook briefs, collateral sections) — a temporary back-compat bridge (Story G0-S1) slated for deletion as consumers rewire in S2/S3.

nodes.name: _coerce_bloom
nodes.summary: Coerces raw Bloom-level strings onto the canonical Bloom enum with tolerant fallbacks.

nodes.name: from_irene_statement
nodes.summary: Builds a canonical LearningObjective from an Irene objective statement.

nodes.name: from_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Adapts a legacy LearningObjectiveBrief to the canonical LearningObjective entity.

nodes.name: to_workbook_brief
nodes.summary: Projects the canonical entity back to the legacy workbook brief shape.

nodes.name: section_binds_objective
nodes.summary: Checks whether a WorkbookSection binds the given learning objective id.

nodes.name: log.py
nodes.summary: Lesson Plan Log (Story 31-2): append-only JSONL write path with single-writer enforcement matrix, six named mandatory events, Pydantic payload shapes, and the assert_plan_fresh staleness gate that downstream consumers must call.
nodes.languageNotes: Append-only JSONL with a Literal closed-set WriterIdentity and a writer-event matrix enforced at append time.

nodes.name: _validate_repo_relative_path
nodes.summary: Rejects absolute or non-repo-relative paths in payload path fields.

nodes.name: SourceRef
nodes.summary: Pydantic source reference with repo-relative path validation and content digest.

nodes.name: PrePacketSnapshotPayload
nodes.summary: Payload shape for the pre_packet_snapshot mandatory event, including the pre-packet artifact path and step-03 extraction checksum.

nodes.name: PlanLockedPayload
nodes.summary: Payload shape for the plan.locked event carrying the lesson-plan digest.

nodes.name: LessonPlanLog
nodes.summary: Append-only JSONL log with single-writer matrix enforcement, corruption detection, and latest plan revision/digest queries.

nodes.name: assert_plan_fresh
nodes.summary: Module-level staleness gate: raises StalePlanRefError when an envelope plan_revision/digest lag the log head.

nodes.name: modality_producer.py
nodes.summary: ModalityProducer abstract base class (Story 31-3): the contract every concrete modality producer subclasses — pinned modality_ref and status ClassVars checked at subclass time, and an abstract produce() returning a ProducedAsset without mutating its inputs.

nodes.name: ModalityProducer
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for modality producers: __init_subclass__ pins modality_ref/status ClassVars and produce() must return a ProducedAsset with fulfills set.

nodes.name: modality_registry.py
nodes.summary: Closed-set modality registry (Story 31-3): five atomic producer targets at MVP (slides and blueprint ready; leader-guide, handout, classroom-exercise pending) with a query API; widening requires a schema-version bump and changelog entry.

nodes.name: ModalityEntry
nodes.summary: Registry entry for an atomic modality with pending-implies-null-producer-class-path validation.

nodes.name: get_modality_entry
nodes.summary: Looks up a modality entry by ref with an explicit unknown-ref error.

nodes.name: produced_asset.py
nodes.summary: ProductionContext and ProducedAsset Pydantic shapes (Story 31-3): the twin input/output contract for ModalityProducer, carrying lesson-plan revision/digest and the fulfills unit-at-revision cross-field counterfeit validator.

nodes.name: ProductionContext
nodes.summary: Minimal produce() input carrying lesson_plan_revision and digest; a subclassable extensibility seam for producer-specific fields.

nodes.name: ProducedAsset
nodes.summary: Producer output shape with timezone-aware created_at and the fulfills {unit_id}@{revision} regex plus cross-field counterfeit validator.

nodes.name: quinn_r_gate.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic Quinn-R step-13 two-branch gate: evaluates each lesson-plan unit through either the produced-asset quality branch or the Irene-plus-writer sign-off branch without mutating the plan, and emits a machine-readable audit artifact.

nodes.name: QuinnRUnitVerdict
nodes.summary: Per-unit gate verdict: branch taken, pass/fail, reason, and asset ref.

nodes.name: QuinnRTwoBranchResult
nodes.summary: Gate result artifact with plan ref, timezone-aware evaluated_at, unit verdicts, and carried-forward declined rationales.

nodes.name: evaluate_quinn_r_two_branch_gate
nodes.summary: Evaluates every plan unit through the produced-asset quality branch or the sign-off branch, preserving declined-unit rationales for the next Irene pass.

nodes.name: emit_quinn_r_gate_artifact
nodes.summary: Writes the machine-readable step-13 gate JSON artifact under the output root.

nodes.name: quiz_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Projects frozen G0 enrichment cards into QuizSpec inputs (Mine-next N3), preferring quiz-typed components with an assessment-like fallback; import-linter Contract M3 safe (no orchestrator imports).

nodes.name: QuizEnrichmentProjection
nodes.summary: Projection result dataclass: QuizSpec plus warnings and an empty-source flag.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_quiz_inputs
nodes.summary: Read-only projection of a frozen G0 enrichment card into QuizSpec inputs, preferring quiz-typed components and sanitizing ids.

nodes.name: quiz_producer.py
nodes.summary: Renders a schema-validated QuizSpec into Markdown and writes the quiz artifact to disk, refusing empty quizzes rather than emitting silent zero-byte successes (Mine-next N3).

nodes.name: render_quiz_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders a validated QuizSpec to Markdown, laying out each quiz item with prompt, choices, expected-answer focus, and source refs; raises QuizProducerError on an empty quiz.

nodes.name: write_quiz_artifact
nodes.summary: Renders the quiz Markdown and writes it to the output path, creating parent directories and verifying a non-empty file landed on disk.

nodes.name: quiz_spec.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic content model for the quiz collateral family: LO-linked short quiz items carrying prompt, choices, expected answer focus, and source refs, distinct from workbook and drill artifacts.

nodes.name: QuizSourceRef
nodes.summary: Frozen Pydantic model anchoring a quiz item to one source location via ref_id, locator, and excerpt.

nodes.name: QuizItem
nodes.summary: One LO-linked quiz item with prompt, choices, expected_answer_focus, and source_refs; validates non-whitespace text fields.

nodes.name: QuizSpec
nodes.summary: Top-level quiz artifact spec (schema_version, kind, title, items) consumed by the quiz producer; enforces a non-empty title.

nodes.name: research_packet.py
nodes.summary: W1 thin shared research-packet reader (shape-pin): loads the research_wiring contribution at node 04.55 from run.json into an immutable ResearchPacket, with named consumer resolvers so glossary and trends consumers witness the same packet_digest.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately avoids importing app.marcus.orchestrator (M3 safety) by reusing the lesson_plan disk seam for run-envelope access.

nodes.name: ResearchPacket
nodes.summary: Immutable dataclass carrying the loaded research packet: status, usable entries, known losses, intake/triangulation metadata, and a canonical packet_digest, with a usable() predicate.

nodes.name: load_research_packet
nodes.summary: Single shared load path: reads the run envelope, extracts the 04.55 research_wiring contribution, shape-checks each entry, records losses for malformed rows, and returns a digest-stamped ResearchPacket (empty packet on missing/absent contribution).

nodes.name: resolve_for_consumer
nodes.summary: Named-consumer resolver wrapping load_research_packet with consumer-scoped error handling and an optional require_usable guard.

nodes.name: resolve_for_glossary_writer
nodes.summary: Convenience resolver binding the shared packet load path to the glossary-writer consumer identity.

nodes.name: resolve_for_trends_projector
nodes.summary: Convenience resolver binding the shared packet load path to the trends-projector consumer identity.

nodes.name: retrieval_narration_grammar.py
nodes.summary: Pure wording seam (Story 30-5) that turns a Tracy-style retrieval posture result into a single Maya-facing Marcus sentence; performs no dispatch, no state mutation, and no log writes.

nodes.name: render_retrieval_narration
nodes.summary: Validates a Tracy posture result mapping, normalizes the posture, and renders the corresponding Marcus-facing narration sentence (corroborate posture gets a classification-specific phrase).

nodes.name: schema.py
nodes.summary: Lesson Plan schema primitives (Story 31-1): the reviewable Pydantic v2 contract for downstream stories, including the ScopeDecision state machine with Maya-lock bypass guard, PlanUnit with red-rejection, revision/digest-carrying LessonPlan, and Irene FitReport shapes.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Pydantic v2 idioms throughout: model_validator(mode="after") guards, Field(exclude=True) for the private actor taxonomy, timezone-aware datetime validators, and triple-layer red-rejection on closed enums.

nodes.name: LearningModel
nodes.summary: Identifies the learning model (id + version) a lesson plan is authored against.

nodes.name: PlanRef
nodes.summary: Lightweight reference to a lesson plan snapshot by revision and digest, used to pin downstream artifacts to the plan they were built from.

nodes.name: Dials
nodes.summary: Per-unit tuning dials (enrichment, corroboration) the operator can adjust during the 4A loop.

nodes.name: IdentifiedGap
nodes.summary: Names a diagnosed gap on a plan unit (gap_id, description, suggested_posture) consumed later by step 07 gap dispatch.

nodes.name: ScopeDecision
nodes.summary: Scope-decision state machine with a two-level actor surface (public proposed_by vs private internal taxonomy excluded from dumps), a Q-5 bypass guard rejecting locked states not ratified by Maya, timezone-aware lock timestamps, and a transition_to() method enforcing legal state transitions.

nodes.name: BlueprintSignoff
nodes.summary: Records blueprint signoff evidence: repo-relative asset/artifact paths (validated non-absolute, no traversal), Irene review and writer signoff flags, and a timezone-aware signed_at.

nodes.name: PlanUnit
nodes.summary: One lesson-plan unit binding event type, source-fitness diagnosis, scope decision, weather band, verbatim rationale, optional blueprint signoff, gaps, and dials; rejects red fitness values and validates scope-state consistency.

nodes.name: LessonPlan
nodes.summary: Top-level lesson plan aggregate carrying plan units, monotonic revision, timezone-aware updated_at, and canonical digest; bump_revision() recomputes the digest and apply_revision() enforces optimistic concurrency via StaleRevisionError.

nodes.name: FitDiagnosis
nodes.summary: Irene's per-unit fitness diagnosis with commentary and recommended scope decision / weather band; rejects red recommended values.

nodes.name: FitReport
nodes.summary: Irene's whole-plan fit report: source ref, plan ref, per-unit diagnoses, timezone-aware generated_at, and the Irene budget in milliseconds.

nodes.name: step_05_pre_packet_handoff.py
nodes.summary: Step 05 pre-packet handoff consumer boundary (Story 30-4): validates the fanout envelope shape and asserts plan freshness against the lesson plan log before the handoff proceeds.

nodes.name: Step05PrePacketEnvelope
nodes.summary: Frozen plan-ref envelope (revision, digest, step_id '05') consumed at the step 05 boundary.

nodes.name: consume
nodes.summary: Validates the incoming payload as a Step05PrePacketEnvelope and asserts the referenced plan revision/digest is still fresh in the log.

nodes.name: step_06_plan_lock_fanout.py
nodes.summary: Step 06 plan-lock fanout consumer boundary (Story 30-4): validates the fanout envelope shape and asserts plan freshness against the lesson plan log.

nodes.name: Step06PlanLockFanoutEnvelope
nodes.summary: Frozen plan-ref envelope (revision, digest, step_id '06') consumed at the step 06 boundary.

nodes.name: consume
nodes.summary: Validates the incoming payload as a Step06PlanLockFanoutEnvelope and asserts the referenced plan revision/digest is still fresh in the log.

nodes.name: step_07_gap_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Step 07 gap-dispatch consumer boundary (Story 30-4): validates the per-gap fanout envelope (unit_id, gap_type, optional bridge_status) and asserts plan freshness before gap work dispatches.

nodes.name: Step07GapDispatchEnvelope
nodes.summary: Frozen plan-ref envelope for step 07 carrying unit_id, gap_type, and optional bridge_status alongside the plan revision/digest.

nodes.name: consume
nodes.summary: Validates the incoming payload as a Step07GapDispatchEnvelope and asserts the referenced plan revision/digest is still fresh in the log.

nodes.name: trends_projection.py
nodes.summary: W3 projection layer that turns wrangled research-packet rows into a grounded ResearchTrendsBrief (trend claims plus bounded hot-topic callouts) and renders the trends backmatter Markdown; model-prior-only topics are rejected or marked unusable rather than fabricated.
nodes.languageNotes: M3-safe: imports research_packet (lesson_plan seam) rather than marcus.orchestrator.

nodes.name: ResearchTrendClaim
nodes.summary: One grounded trend claim carrying citation id, source ref, evidence-hierarchy tier, provider provenance, triangulation status, and derived confidence.

nodes.name: HotTopicCallout
nodes.summary: Bounded hot-topic callout with rationale, supporting citation ids, source refs, and confidence.

nodes.name: ResearchTrendsBrief
nodes.summary: Aggregate brief of trends, hot topics, known losses, and empty_reason with a usable() predicate that requires at least one grounded item.

nodes.name: reject_model_prior_topic
nodes.summary: Grounding gate for injected topics: a topic only becomes a hot-topic callout if packet-row titles corroborate it; otherwise it is returned as a rejected, packet-ungrounded callout rather than silently kept.

nodes.name: project_trends_from_packet
nodes.summary: Core projection: converts usable packet entries into sorted trend claims and derives bounded hot-topic callouts, accumulating known losses for skipped rows and returning an unusable brief with empty_reason when nothing grounds.

nodes.name: trends_inputs_from_run
nodes.summary: Run-dir convenience wrapper: resolves the shared research packet for the trends projector and projects it into a ResearchTrendsBrief.

nodes.name: render_trends_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders the ResearchTrendsBrief into the trends + hot-topics backmatter Markdown section, including provenance and known-losses disclosure.

nodes.name: workbook_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: P5-S1 consumption layer projecting the frozen, operator-confirmed G0 enrichment card (typed components, citation resolutions, pedagogy annotations) into workbook producer render inputs, enforcing the authoritative-citation render gate; also hosts the shared run-envelope loading helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Render gate is a most-restrictive-wins AND-conjunction: teachable AND resolved AND access_url; resolved-but-unteachable citations are suppressed with a hard logger.error diagnostic, never a silent drop.

nodes.name: WorkbookEnrichmentProjection
nodes.summary: Projection result bundling the collateral spec overlay, learning objectives, further-reading entries, answer keys, citations, and the source-ref manifest fed to the workbook producer.

nodes.name: RunEnvelopeCorruptError
nodes.summary: Raised when the run.json envelope is missing or structurally corrupt so consumers fail loud instead of reading a partial run state.

nodes.name: load_enrichment_card
nodes.summary: Loads the frozen G0EnrichmentResult card payload from the run directory, returning None when no confirmed card exists.

nodes.name: citation_renders_authoritative
nodes.summary: The Texas render gate: a citation renders an authoritative link iff teachable is True AND resolution_status is 'resolved' AND resolved_ref carries a truthy access_url.

nodes.name: _project_further_reading
nodes.summary: Projects P2 citation resolutions into further-reading entries, applying the render gate per citation and emitting hard diagnostics for coherence breaches (resolved citations on unteachable components).

nodes.name: _project_exercises
nodes.summary: Projects typed components plus P3 pedagogy annotations (bloom level) into exercise inputs, tracking which component ids were surfaced.

nodes.name: project_enrichment_to_workbook_inputs
nodes.summary: Top-level projection that turns a frozen G0 enrichment card into a WorkbookEnrichmentProjection (exercises, further reading, answer keys, LO statements) so the rendered workbook is genuinely shaped by the enriched corpus.

nodes.name: load_run_envelope
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the run.json envelope from a run directory, raising RunEnvelopeCorruptError on missing or malformed content; the shared disk seam reused by research_packet and other consumers.

nodes.name: lesson_plan_from_run
nodes.summary: Reads the lesson_plan mapping out of the run envelope for a run directory.

nodes.name: collateral_from_run
nodes.summary: Reads Irene's authored collateral blueprint from the run envelope's lesson_plan section.

nodes.name: research_entries_from_run
nodes.summary: Reads the S6 research_entries list from the run envelope for citation-manifest rendering.

nodes.name: workbook_producer.py
nodes.summary: Workbook ModalityProducer for the braid client deliverable: composes the workbook companion to the narrated deck from transcript segments and enrichment inputs, with canonical Markdown plus DOCX rendered from the same composed model, and fidelity audits over numerics, citations, exercises, and LO bindings.
nodes.languageNotes: DP3 render path: Markdown is canonical, DOCX is rendered from the same composed model via python-docx so the deliverable cannot diverge; PDF is explicitly deferred.

nodes.name: DuplicateCollateralIdError
nodes.summary: Raised when collateral section or objective ids collide, preventing ambiguous workbook composition.

nodes.name: TranscriptSegment
nodes.summary: One narrated transcript segment (slide id, narration text, optional figure asset path) consumed as workbook composition input.

nodes.name: LearningObjectiveBrief
nodes.summary: Learning-objective input (id, statement, bloom level) bound into the workbook's objectives section.

nodes.name: FurtherReadingEntry
nodes.summary: Further-reading input entry (title, access URL, provenance) rendered into the workbook backmatter.

nodes.name: ResearchEntry
nodes.summary: S6 research citation entry (citation id, source ref, tier, provenance) rendered under the G2 citation manifest.

nodes.name: load_transcript_segments
nodes.summary: Loads and validates transcript segments from the storyboard-B segment manifest YAML, mapping each slide to its narration text and optional figure asset.

nodes.name: assert_unique_collateral_ids
nodes.summary: Guards against duplicate section and objective ids in the collateral blueprint, raising DuplicateCollateralIdError on collision.

nodes.name: audit_workbook_numeric_fidelity
nodes.summary: Runs the frozen-neck audit_numeric_provenance read-only over the composed workbook body against the source set and converts the report into workbook-scoped fidelity findings.

nodes.name: audit_citation_fidelity
nodes.summary: Checks that every citation rendered in the workbook traces back to a supplied research or further-reading entry, reporting orphaned citations.

nodes.name: assert_exercise_fidelity
nodes.summary: Asserts each rendered exercise is backed by an enrichment-projected exercise input, raising WorkbookFidelityError on fabricated exercises.

nodes.name: assert_learning_objective_bindings
nodes.summary: Validates that workbook sections bind to known learning-objective ids and that no objective is silently dropped from the deliverable.

nodes.name: default_prose_revoicer
nodes.summary: Default deterministic body renderer for narrative prose; the injectable seam an LLM revoicer can replace while the composed skeleton stays deterministic.

nodes.name: compose_workbook
nodes.summary: The composition core: assembles transcript segments, collateral sections, enrichment projections, exercises, research citations, and further reading into the canonical composed workbook document model, running the fidelity guards along the way.

nodes.name: render_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders the composed workbook model to the canonical Markdown string (the citation-injection substrate).

nodes.name: render_docx_from_model
nodes.summary: Renders the client DOCX deliverable from the same composed model via python-docx so it cannot diverge from the canonical Markdown.

nodes.name: WorkbookSidecar
nodes.summary: Sidecar result bundling the produced workbook assets (markdown, docx) with audit reports and coverage references.

nodes.name: WorkbookProducer
nodes.summary: The concrete ModalityProducer: produce() composes the workbook, verifies segment coverage and the workbook-superset-of-VO invariant, renders Markdown + DOCX under repo-root output containment, and returns a ProducedAsset with fulfills bound to the plan unit and revision.

nodes.name: dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrator-side routing seam for Intake-originated pre-packet emissions: the sole module (outside write_api) allowed to invoke the single-writer write API, plus a generic orchestrator event dispatch path (Story 30-2b).
nodes.languageNotes: The single-writer monopoly is enforced by an AST contract test (tests/contracts/test_30_2b_dispatch_monopoly.py) in addition to runtime writer gating.

nodes.name: dispatch_intake_pre_packet
nodes.summary: Lands an Intake-built pre_packet_snapshot envelope in the Lesson Plan log via write_api.emit_pre_packet_snapshot with the orchestrator writer identity; the sole sanctioned caller for Intake-originated flows.

nodes.name: dispatch_orchestrator_event
nodes.summary: Generic orchestrator-side event dispatch appending named loop events (plan_unit.created, scope_decision.set, plan.locked, fanout envelopes) to the Lesson Plan log under single-writer discipline.

nodes.name: fanout.py
nodes.summary: Plan-lock fanout emitter seam (Story 30-4): builds step 05+ envelopes from a locked lesson plan and emits fanout.envelope.emitted log events through a caller-injected dispatch callable, preserving single-writer discipline.

nodes.name: StepFanoutEnvelope
nodes.summary: Typed envelope payload for one fanout step emission, pinning the plan revision/digest the downstream step must validate against.

nodes.name: PlanLockFanoutResult
nodes.summary: Result container reporting which step envelopes were emitted during plan-lock fanout.

nodes.name: emit_plan_lock_fanout
nodes.summary: Builds step 05/06/07 envelopes from a locked LessonPlan (including per-gap step 07 envelopes with bridge status) and emits each as a fanout.envelope.emitted event through the injected dispatch callable.

nodes.name: hil_intake.py
nodes.summary: Production HIL intake bridge for Step 04A (Story 32-5): serves operator pre-collected scope-ratification decisions to FourALoop.run_4a via an intake callable, and supports explicitly confirmed lesson-plan log resets.

nodes.name: MissingIntakeDecisionError
nodes.summary: Raised when the 4A loop requests a decision for a unit the operator never ratified conversationally, naming the missing unit for a clean error surface.

nodes.name: MarcusPreCollectedIntakeCallable
nodes.summary: Production IntakeCallable that serves pre-collected operator decisions (gathered during the conversational ratification phase) to FourALoop.run_4a on demand.

nodes.name: build_hil_intake_callable
nodes.summary: Factory that validates the operator's pre-collected decision map and wraps it in a MarcusPreCollectedIntakeCallable for the 4A loop.

nodes.name: reset_lesson_plan_log
nodes.summary: Resets the lesson-plan log for a fresh 4A run, requiring an explicit confirmation flag and raising LogResetNotConfirmedError otherwise.

nodes.name: loop.py
nodes.summary: The 4A conversation loop (Stories 30-3a/30-3b): iterates plan units through scope-decision intake, dial tuning, and sync reassessment with Irene, then triggers plan lock — emitting plan_unit.created, scope_decision.set, and plan.locked events via the orchestrator dispatch seam.

nodes.name: PlanAlreadyLockedError
nodes.summary: Raised when a 4A operation is attempted on a plan that has already locked, carrying the locked revision for the caller's error surface.

nodes.name: FourAState
nodes.summary: Mutable loop state tracking the working LessonPlan and per-unit progress, with ratified_units/pending_units views driving loop iteration and the lock trigger.

nodes.name: intake_scope_decision
nodes.summary: Records one operator scope decision for a plan unit: validates the transition through ScopeDecision.transition_to, bumps the plan revision, and emits scope_decision.set through the dispatch callable.

nodes.name: SyncReassessmentResult
nodes.summary: Result container for a sync reassessment round: the updated plan plus Irene's refreshed diagnosis outcome.

nodes.name: tune_unit_dials
nodes.summary: Applies operator dial adjustments (enrichment, corroboration) to a plan unit, bumping the plan revision and emitting the corresponding log event.

nodes.name: sync_reassess_with_irene
nodes.summary: Runs a synchronous Irene reassessment of a plan unit after dial changes, folding the refreshed fit diagnosis and weather band back into the plan and narrating the retrieval result to the operator.

nodes.name: trigger_plan_lock_if_ready
nodes.summary: Checks that every plan unit is ratified and, when ready, transitions the plan to locked, emits plan.locked, and raises PlanAlreadyLockedError on double-lock attempts.

nodes.name: FourALoop
nodes.summary: Loop driver whose run_4a() iterates plan units through the injected intake callable, emitting plan_unit.created per unit, recording scope decisions, and locking the plan when all units are ratified.

nodes.name: maya_walkthrough.py
nodes.summary: Release-gate ceremony harness (Story 32-4) that drives the landed MVP chain through a canned 7-page SME fixture and records stage-by-stage evidence for the Maya pantomime AC: paste source, weather ribbon, gray card click, delegation proposal, one-sentence rationale, card turns gold.

nodes.name: WeatherRibbonEvidence
nodes.summary: Stage-2 evidence model capturing the weather ribbon shown to Maya; rejects red bands and unknown values to keep abundance framing.

nodes.name: MayaWalkthroughResult
nodes.summary: In-module aggregate of all six stage evidences plus declined articulations and a timezone-aware completion timestamp; deliberately not exported through app.marcus.lesson_plan.

nodes.name: _build_canned_plan
nodes.summary: Builds the canned 7-page SME fixture lesson plan the walkthrough drives through the real MVP seams.

nodes.name: run_maya_walkthrough
nodes.summary: Executes the six walkthrough stages in order through existing production seams (pre-packet emission, run_4a, dispatch) and assembles a MayaWalkthroughResult evidence record for the release gate.

nodes.name: trial_smoke_harness.py
nodes.summary: Trial-run smoke harness (Story 32-3): drives the 4A workflow chain end-to-end with packet-plan fixtures, routes the step-04 gate through the workflow runner, consumes the step 05/06/07 fanout envelopes, evaluates the Quinn-R trial-readiness battery, and reports per-step smoke statuses.

nodes.name: TrialReadinessBattery
nodes.summary: Aggregates the Quinn-R two-branch gate outcomes into a trial-readiness verdict for the smoke report.

nodes.name: TrialSmokeReport
nodes.summary: Top-level smoke report bundling per-step SmokeStepResults, the readiness battery, and overall pass/fail status.

nodes.name: run_trial_run_smoke_harness
nodes.summary: Main harness: prepares the Irene packet, builds a packet-plan fixture, routes step 04 to 05 via the workflow runner, consumes step 05/06/07 fanout payloads against the target log, emits the coverage manifest, evaluates the readiness battery, and assembles the TrialSmokeReport.

nodes.name: workflow_runner.py
nodes.summary: Lesson Planner workflow runner seam (Stories 32-1/32-5): inserts Step 4A between the step-04 gate and step 05, routing the baton handoff through Facade.run_4a with support for pre-collected HIL intake decisions.

nodes.name: StepBatonHandoff
nodes.summary: Typed baton passed between workflow steps, pinning the plan reference the next step must honor.

nodes.name: Step4AWorkflowResult
nodes.summary: Result container for the Step 4A insertion: the locked plan plus the outgoing baton handoff.

nodes.name: insert_between
nodes.summary: Validates against the pipeline manifest that Step 4A is legally inserted between the step-04 gate and step 05 in the workflow ordering.

nodes.name: route_step_04_gate_to_step_05
nodes.summary: Routes the step-04 gate into Step 4A: resolves the facade, runs run_4a with the supplied or pre-collected-decision intake callable, and returns the locked plan plus baton handoff toward step 05.

nodes.name: write_api.py
nodes.summary: Single-writer entry point for Marcus-Orchestrator appends of pre_packet_snapshot events to the Lesson Plan log; gates callers by envelope type, writer identity, and event type in a deliberate precedence order so unauthorized callers learn nothing about envelope validity.
nodes.languageNotes: Gate ordering is a security-style precedence rider (Q-1): the writer gate fires before the event-type gate.

nodes.name: UnauthorizedFacadeCallerError
nodes.summary: Raised when a caller other than the orchestrator writer identity attempts to append through the write API, with a caller-scoped error message.

nodes.name: emit_pre_packet_snapshot
nodes.summary: The one sanctioned append path for pre_packet_snapshot events: type-gates the EventEnvelope, writer-gates the caller, event-gates the envelope type, then appends to the Lesson Plan log.

nodes.name: append_event
nodes.summary: Thin last-mile append of a validated envelope to the Lesson Plan log after the gates have passed.

nodes.name: source_fidelity_audit.py
nodes.summary: WARN-only, non-gating L2 source-provenance audit measuring how faithfully a delivered narration's numeric assertions and semantic framing trace to the source corpus; it only ever returns report dicts (FAIL solely on zero-denominator guard) and is a pure read-only caller of the frozen-neck figure_tokens module.

nodes.name: audit_semantic_framing
nodes.summary: WARN-only heuristic tripwire that flags candidate framing sentences in the narration whose semantic claims may not be corroborated by the source; reports candidates, never gates.

nodes.name: audit_numeric_provenance
nodes.summary: Core numeric-provenance audit: extracts numeric tokens from narration and source via the frozen-neck figure tokenizer, matches narration figures to nearest source tokens, and returns a drift report; only FAILs on the zero-denominator guard when either side yields no numeric tokens.

nodes.name: _act.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic in-graph 07W adapter over WorkbookProducer: self-resolves the running run's directory, loads transcript segments and Gary deck figures, consumes Irene's collateral blueprint as the authoritative structure with the frozen G0 enrichment card as a resolution overlay, projects glossary and trends from the shared research packet, and produces the workbook sidecar.
nodes.languageNotes: Honors the declaration discriminant: present+blueprint means produce, otherwise the act emits an explicit skip output rather than fabricating a workbook.

nodes.name: WorkbookInputs
nodes.summary: Bundle of everything the producer needs for one workbook: segments, collateral blueprint, enrichment projection, research entries, glossary and trends projections, and source text for the numeric gate.

nodes.name: decode_envelope_payload
nodes.summary: Decodes the dispatched envelope payload against the consumed-payload contract, tolerating the ignored upstream_output trigger key.

nodes.name: _load_segments
nodes.summary: Loads transcript segments from the run's storyboard-B segment manifest and maps each slide to its Gary deck export figure when present on disk.

nodes.name: _research_inputs
nodes.summary: Reads the S6 research_entries from run.json and converts them into ResearchEntry inputs for the G2 citation manifest, recording losses for malformed rows.

nodes.name: build_workbook_inputs
nodes.summary: Assembles WorkbookInputs from the run dir: segments, source text for the G1 numeric gate, Irene's collateral blueprint, the G0 enrichment projection overlay, research entries, and the W2 glossary plus W3 trends projections from the shared research packet.

nodes.name: produce_workbook
nodes.summary: Instantiates WorkbookProducer with the resolved output root and runs production over the built inputs, returning the produced sidecar assets.

nodes.name: act
nodes.summary: Specialist entry point: decodes the payload, resolves the run dir, honors the declaration discriminant (produce vs explicit skip), and records the audit trail plus sidecar refs on the run state.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Ratchet-D consumed-payload contract for the 07W workbook producer: declares CONSUMED_PAYLOAD_KEYS (upstream_output trigger, run_dir and output_root overrides) since the terminal sidecar self-resolves its real inputs from the run directory on disk.

nodes.name: source_fidelity_report.py
nodes.summary: Read-only CLI that runs the WARN-only L2 numeric provenance audit on a trial run: loads the delivered narration from the storyboard-B segment manifest and the source slide corpus, then writes and prints the audit report into the run's exports directory.

nodes.name: load_narration
nodes.summary: Loads the delivered narration text by joining the narration_text of every segment in the trial's storyboard-B segment manifest.

nodes.name: load_source_corpus
nodes.summary: Concatenates all slide markdown files from the course corpus directory into the source text for the audit.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point: parses the trial id, loads narration and source corpus, runs audit_numeric_provenance, and writes the JSON report into the run's exports directory.

nodes.name: production_runner.py
nodes.summary: Production-graph runner composition layer: compiles the manifest into a run graph, walks nodes to dispatch specialists, pauses at HIL gates with decision cards, and owns the full trial lifecycle (start, resume, recover, batch-resume) across the two-walk architecture.
nodes.languageNotes: Two separate node walks by design (start walk stops at G1; the continuation walk owns G2B+), so every gate side-effect must land in BOTH walk bodies.

nodes.name: research_citation.py
nodes.summary: Citation half of the Braid S3 research wiring: mints cited research entries with deterministic source_ref/source_hash from accepted Texas retrieval rows and runs the G2 citation-fidelity gate in FAIL mode (a single unsourced citation is RED).

nodes.name: research_credibility.py
nodes.summary: Classifies Texas retrieval rows onto the closed evidence-hierarchy tier set (T1 systematic review down to unclassified) using heuristic metadata, and extracts provider provenance per row.

nodes.name: research_detective_gate.py
nodes.summary: R7 hard-pause gate that blocks Irene Pass-2 dispatch until an operator disposition receipt (approve/reject/defer) is on disk; its error subclasses SpecialistDispatchError so the runner routes through _pause_at_error.

nodes.name: research_wiring.py
nodes.summary: Runner-wired Braid S3 research hook: at manifest node 04.55 it runs the Irene-Tracy-Texas bridge, resolves the research posture, dispatches retrieval intents to live Scite/Consensus providers, and mints cited research entries onto the run record.
nodes.languageNotes: Attaches as a runner-invoked orchestration hook keyed by node id (no manifest edit), and live retrieval degrades gracefully when provider credentials are absent.

nodes.name: routing.py
nodes.summary: Manifest-driven specialist routing: resolves the next step transition into a RoutingDecision from the PipelineManifest for the Marcus orchestrator.

nodes.name: slide_variant_selection.py
nodes.summary: Parses the Storyboard-A chooser code (SBA-<run_tag>-1:A 2:B ...) the operator pastes as the G2B verdict edit_payload into a {slide_id: variant} map, failing loud on any coverage gap so partial picks never silently default.

nodes.name: specialist_summary_writer.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrator-facing re-export shim for the specialist summary writer API; the implementation lives under app.models.state so specialist graphs can emit summaries without importing app.marcus and breaking lane contracts.

nodes.name: styleguide_picker.py
nodes.summary: Pre-run HTML style-picker at CD entry: renders a localhost card-grid from the CD-owned styleguide SSOT, captures the operator's pick via an ephemeral same-origin http.server, and writes it into the run directive's gamma_settings with a provenance audit block.
nodes.languageNotes: Stdlib-only by design (plus pyyaml); directive read-modify-write and sidecar append take an advisory same-host file lock via msvcrt.locking/fcntl.flock.

nodes.name: supervisor.py
nodes.summary: Orchestration supervisor adapting the Slab 3 FR27 preset switch onto the Marcus package; delegates step transitions to the manifest-driven route_step.

nodes.name: udac_wiring.py
nodes.summary: UDAC v1 orchestrator wiring: writes run-asset-index gate ratifications as a both-walks gate side-effect and resolves consumed assets fail-loud at the shared specialist dispatch site; feature-flagged, default OFF.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel for runtime-owned Pydantic models: re-exports AdhocResponse, ProductionEnvelope, SpecialistContribution, ProductionTrialEnvelope, and the trial economics report models.

nodes.name: _build_decision_card
nodes.summary: Assembles the per-gate decision card (variant/voice candidates, cost, artifacts, chooser links) presented to the operator at each HIL pause.

nodes.name: _runner_payload_for_specialist
nodes.summary: Builds the envelope payload dispatched to each specialist node, threading directive-derived settings, enrichment hints, and chartered runner context keys.

nodes.name: _pause_at_gate
nodes.summary: Pauses the walk at a production gate: registers the decision card, persists the conversation turn and checkpoint, and emits the transport response for the operator.

nodes.name: _dispatch_specialist_at_node
nodes.summary: Shared dispatch site for specialist nodes on both walks; enforces upstream contributions, UDAC asset resolution, and the research-detective gate before spend.

nodes.name: _pause_at_error
nodes.summary: Converts a specialist dispatch failure into a recoverable paused-trial state with a persisted error checkpoint instead of crashing the walk.

nodes.name: _pause_at_provider_batch
nodes.summary: Pauses the trial while a provider-side LLM batch is in flight, persisting the batch receipt so resume can poll and continue.

nodes.name: apply_llm_execution_mode_overlay
nodes.summary: Applies the batch-vs-interactive LLM execution mode overlay onto the run's model configuration.

nodes.name: run_production_trial
nodes.summary: Start walk: composes and freezes the run graph from the component selection, runs pre-G1 nodes (enrichment, research wiring, builders), and pauses at the first gate G1.

nodes.name: resume_production_trial
nodes.summary: Resumes a paused trial from an operator verdict: rehydrates state from the frozen run record, applies the verdict, and continues the walk.

nodes.name: resume_batch_production_trial
nodes.summary: Resumes a trial paused on a provider-side LLM batch: polls the batch, folds results into contributions, and continues the walk.

nodes.name: recover_production_trial
nodes.summary: Recovers a trial from its last persisted checkpoint after a crash or interruption, revalidating the frozen graph before continuing.

nodes.name: _continue_production_walk
nodes.summary: Continuation walk owning all post-G1 nodes: dispatches specialists, fires gate side-effects (publishers, coverage, UDAC, research), and pauses at each subsequent gate.

nodes.name: CitedResearchEntry
nodes.summary: Frozen model of one cited research entry: provider, source_ref, source_hash, credibility fields, and the claim text it supports.

nodes.name: mint_cited_entry
nodes.summary: Mints a CitedResearchEntry from an accepted Texas row with a deterministic source_ref and a stable content source_hash.

nodes.name: apply_triangulation_to_entries
nodes.summary: Marks entries as triangulated when independent providers corroborate the same claim, upgrading their credibility annotations.

nodes.name: count_unsourced_citations
nodes.summary: Counts run citations whose source_ref does not resolve to a retrieval row or corpus source in this run's set.

nodes.name: gate_citation_fidelity
nodes.summary: G2 citation-fidelity gate in FAIL mode: raises CitationFidelityError unless unsourced_citations == 0.

nodes.name: audit_research_supplements
nodes.summary: Runs the source-fidelity audits (semantic framing + numeric provenance) over research supplements against their cited sources.

nodes.name: assemble_l2_citation_report
nodes.summary: Assembles the L2 citation report combining the citation manifest, fidelity gate result, duplicates, and audit findings.

nodes.name: dedupe_cited_entries
nodes.summary: Removes duplicate cited entries (same source_ref/claim) while preserving first-seen order.

nodes.name: classify_evidence_hierarchy
nodes.summary: Heuristically maps a Texas row's metadata onto the closed evidence-hierarchy tier set (systematic review, peer-reviewed RCT, preprint, etc.).

nodes.name: write_landing_point
nodes.summary: Writes the landing-point receipt describing what the operator must review before disposing the research findings.

nodes.name: write_disposition
nodes.summary: Writes the operator disposition receipt (approve/reject/defer) to disk, the artifact that unlocks Irene Pass-2 spend.

nodes.name: enforce_before_pass2
nodes.summary: Hard-pause enforcement at the dispatch site: raises ResearchDetectiveGateError when Pass-2 would dispatch without a valid unlocking disposition on disk.

nodes.name: DeterministicPostureSelector
nodes.summary: Deterministic selector mapping each identified research gap to a retrieval posture and intent without any LLM call.

nodes.name: resolve_research_posture
nodes.summary: Resolves the active research posture for a run from env flags and directive intent (legacy vs detective vs bolster).

nodes.name: consensus_creds_present
nodes.summary: Checks whether Consensus provider credentials are present so live retrieval can be attempted rather than degraded.

nodes.name: has_research_goals
nodes.summary: Returns whether any in-scope plan unit carries research-enrichment goals worth dispatching.

nodes.name: _dispatch_intents_to_texas
nodes.summary: Dispatches shaped retrieval intents through Texas's dispatcher against the live Scite/Consensus adapters, returning accepted rows.

nodes.name: run_research_wiring
nodes.summary: Main runner hook at node 04.55: runs the bridge over locked plan units, dispatches intents, mints cited entries, and attaches the research result to the run record.

nodes.name: RoutingDecision
nodes.summary: One manifest-resolved step transition (current node, next node, dispatch kind).

nodes.name: route_step
nodes.summary: Resolves the next RoutingDecision from the PipelineManifest given the current step and run state.

nodes.name: parse_selection_code
nodes.summary: Parses the SBA-<run_tag>-1:A 2:B ... chooser code into an ordered {slide_index: variant} mapping, rejecting malformed codes.

nodes.name: validate_selections
nodes.summary: Validates total coverage of the parsed selections against the run's slide ids — exactly one chosen variant per slide, no gaps.

nodes.name: read_pick_events
nodes.summary: Reads the append-only picks sidecar JSONL, failing loud on malformed lines, to derive per-guide last_used data.

nodes.name: load_picker_roster
nodes.summary: Loads the pickable styleguide roster from the CD-owned SSOT yaml, joining last_used from the sidecar and applying probe-visibility rules.

nodes.name: render_picker_html
nodes.summary: Renders the card-grid picker HTML page from the roster, with thumbnails, warning chips, and the same-origin /pick form action.

nodes.name: _PickHandler
nodes.summary: http.server request handler serving the picker page and thumbnails and accepting exactly one valid POST /pick before shutdown.

nodes.name: capture_pick
nodes.summary: Serves the picker on an ephemeral localhost port, opens the browser, and blocks until the operator's pick (or CLI fallback) is captured.

nodes.name: write_pick_to_directive
nodes.summary: Writes the captured pick into the run directive's gamma_settings verbatim A/B semantics plus a styleguide_picker_provenance audit block, under an advisory file lock.

nodes.name: append_pick_event
nodes.summary: Appends the pick event to the append-only sidecar JSONL under the advisory lock, keeping the SSOT's last_used null forever (two-store contract).

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point wiring roster load, pick capture, directive write, and sidecar append into one operator ceremony.

nodes.name: Supervisor
nodes.summary: Preset-routing supervisor that selects the orchestration mode and delegates step transitions to route_step.

nodes.name: record_gate_ratification
nodes.summary: Gate WRITER: on gate clearance, assembles/updates the run-asset-index entries for assets ratified at that gate (idempotent, monotonic, disk-primary).

nodes.name: resolve_consumed_assets
nodes.summary: Dispatch-site READER: resolves each consumer-declared asset against the run-asset-index and fails loud on missing or digest-mismatched assets.

nodes.name: adhoc_response.py
nodes.summary: Strict Pydantic response contract (AdhocResponse plus TokenCount usage) for one-shot Marcus ad-hoc LLM asks.

nodes.name: production_envelope.py
nodes.summary: Strict cross-specialist accumulator for production composition: SpecialistContribution and ProductionEnvelope models with content-addressed output digests, tz-aware timestamps, and UUID4 enforcement.
nodes.languageNotes: Strict-mode Pydantic v2 (extra=forbid, validate_assignment=True) per the repo's schema checklist idioms.

nodes.name: production_trial_envelope.py
nodes.summary: Strict envelope for production-graph trial lifecycle state, wrapping the ProductionEnvelope with trial status, gate history, and disk persistence validation.

nodes.name: trial_economics_report.py
nodes.summary: Strict per-trial economics report models: per-agent cost entries, drift alerts, budget status, and the TrialEconomicsReport aggregate.

nodes.name: component_selection.py
nodes.summary: Canonical record of which pipeline components a run composes; lives on RunState so resume/recover rehydrates the selection from the frozen run record, with canonical-JSON serialization feeding the content-addressed composition digest.

nodes.name: operator_verdict.py
nodes.summary: Frozen OperatorVerdict value object for HIL gate decisions (approve/edit/reject) with triple-layer tamper-evidence validation and a small CLI to emit its JSON schema.

nodes.name: specialist_summary_artifacts.py
nodes.summary: Persists per-specialist adjacent-gate summaries: builds length-validated summary text from run state and contributions, emits it to the run directory, and loads the most recent summary for adjacent gate context.

nodes.name: operator_verdict_validators.py
nodes.summary: Standalone cross-field validators for OperatorVerdict: tamper-verb rejection (second layer of the FR34 triple-layer guarantee) and verb/payload consistency (edit requires edit_payload; reject requires reject_reason).

nodes.name: cascade_config.py
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the operator-editable model cascade and pricing YAML configs (with content digests) consumed by economics, plus a CLI that checks the pricing table covers every cascade entry.

nodes.name: economics.py
nodes.summary: Per-trial LLM cost measurement for the migrated runtime: fetches LangSmith traces, attributes usage and cost per agent, computes budget status and per-agent drift, and renders/persists markdown cost reports.

nodes.name: payload_contract.py
nodes.summary: Declares the frozen set of envelope payload keys Gary's act body consumes; the Ratchet-D manifest lockstep test locks dependency edges and S3 builder outputs to this single vocabulary.

nodes.name: TokenCount
nodes.summary: Strict token-usage record (input/output tokens, non-negative) returned by the ad-hoc LLM call.

nodes.name: AdhocResponse
nodes.summary: Strict response contract for a one-shot Marcus ad-hoc ask: answer text plus TokenCount usage.

nodes.name: compute_output_digest
nodes.summary: Computes the canonical sha256 content digest of a specialist output dict (sorted-key JSON).

nodes.name: SpecialistContribution
nodes.summary: One specialist's validated contribution: output payload, content digest, decision trail, and tz-aware timestamps.

nodes.name: ProductionEnvelope
nodes.summary: Cross-specialist accumulator carrying ordered contributions with digest-verified append semantics for production composition.

nodes.name: ProductionTrialEnvelope
nodes.summary: Trial lifecycle envelope wrapping the ProductionEnvelope with trial status, gate history, and validated disk persistence.

nodes.name: TrialEconomicsReport
nodes.summary: Aggregate per-trial economics report: total cost, per-agent entries, budget status, and drift alerts.

nodes.name: ComponentSelection
nodes.summary: Canonical, canonically-serializable record of the components a run composes; rehydrated from the frozen run record on resume/recover.

nodes.name: OperatorVerdict
nodes.summary: Frozen HIL gate verdict (approve/edit/reject) with UUID4/tz-aware enforcement, tamper-verb rejection, and verb/payload consistency validation.

nodes.name: build_summary_text
nodes.summary: Builds the length-validated adjacent-gate summary text (received keys, decisions, artifacts, trail) for one specialist.

nodes.name: emit_summary
nodes.summary: Writes a specialist summary artifact to the run's summary directory with a canonical specialist id and timestamped filename.

nodes.name: emit_summary_for_state
nodes.summary: Convenience emitter deriving the summary content directly from run state and the latest contribution.

nodes.name: load_most_recent_summary
nodes.summary: Loads the most recent summary artifact for a specialist to provide adjacent gate context.

nodes.name: enforce_no_tamper_verbs
nodes.summary: Second tamper-evidence layer: rejects any verdict verb outside the approve/edit/reject closed set, even via model_construct or assignment paths.

nodes.name: enforce_verb_payload_consistency
nodes.summary: Enforces verb/payload consistency: edit requires edit_payload, reject requires reject_reason, and approve forbids both.

nodes.name: CascadeConfig
nodes.summary: Validated model-cascade config (ordered agent-to-model entries) loaded from the operator-editable YAML with a content digest.

nodes.name: PricingTable
nodes.summary: Validated per-model pricing table used to convert token usage into USD cost.

nodes.name: ensure_pricing_covers_cascade
nodes.summary: Asserts every model in the cascade has a pricing entry, failing loud on gaps before any cost math runs.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that loads cascade and pricing configs and reports coverage/digest status.

nodes.name: _fetch_trial_trace
nodes.summary: Fetches the trial's LangSmith trace tree (runs, usage, metadata) via the langsmith client for cost attribution.

nodes.name: check_trial_budget
nodes.summary: Compares measured trial cost against the configured budget and returns the budget status verdict.

nodes.name: compute_per_agent_drift
nodes.summary: Computes per-agent cost drift against the median of historical reports and raises drift alerts past threshold.

nodes.name: measure_trial_cost
nodes.summary: Measures a trial's LLM cost: flattens the trace, attributes billable runs to agents/models, prices usage via the pricing table, and builds the TrialEconomicsReport.

nodes.name: record_trial_cost_report
nodes.summary: Persists the rendered markdown cost report and its JSON payload into the run directory.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the LiteLLM Batch transport (Marcus-SPOC), re-exporting the adapter, error types, join utilities, JSONL encoding, and receipt helpers. Its docstring pins the binding rule that the product batch path is the provider Batch API, never litellm.batch_completion.
nodes.languageNotes: Python package barrel with explicit __all__ and a governance docstring forbidding the litellm.batch_completion parallel-sync helper as the batch path.

nodes.name: adapter.py
nodes.summary: Thin LiteLLM Files + Batches SDK adapter that uploads JSONL, creates/retrieves/cancels provider batches, downloads outputs, and normalizes results into BatchReceipt and join types. Injectable SDK callables enable hermetic testing, and a source guard refuses litellm.batch_completion as the transport.
nodes.languageNotes: Constructor validates injected callables at runtime (AST/source-guarded in hermetic tests) so the forbidden batch_completion path can never be wired in.

nodes.name: cost_report.py
nodes.summary: Builds and persists per-run batch cost reports by aggregating token usage from joined output rows, pricing them via the cascade pricing table, and comparing against realtime cost. Includes a fail-soft emitter so cost reporting never blocks the production walk.

nodes.name: errors.py
nodes.summary: Error types for the LLM batch transport: LlmBatchError (tagged base error) and WaitingForProviderBatchError, the control-flow signal that a submitted provider batch is still pending so the orchestrator can pause and resume later.

nodes.name: join.py
nodes.summary: Joins provider batch output JSONL rows back to their custom_ids, classifying each row as ok/failed and reporting missing or unexpected ids against the expected set. Provides parse_output_jsonl for decoding raw output files.

nodes.name: jsonl.py
nodes.summary: Encodes batch request rows to JSONL with a byte-size budget guard, and builds /v1/chat/completions request rows (custom_id, model, messages, optional extra_body) for provider Batch submission.

nodes.name: prompt_cache.py
nodes.summary: Derives provider prompt-cache keys from configured strategies, resolves the vision node's cache key from the LLM execution config, builds the extra_body payload carrying the key, and extracts cached-token counts from usage objects.

nodes.name: receipts.py
nodes.summary: Defines the BatchReceipt model (batch id, file ids, status, counts, timestamps) and its read/write persistence under the run directory, plus normalization of heterogeneous LiteLLM batch objects into receipts. Receipts are the durable resume anchor for pending provider batches.

nodes.name: llm_batch_eligibility.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic models and loader for the batch-eligibility matrix (A3): per-site flags declaring which pipeline sites are batch-eligible and v1-routed, with validators enforcing that vision is present and consistently marked. Gates whether the vision batch route may run at all.
nodes.languageNotes: Pydantic v2 model validators enforce cross-field invariants (v1_routed implies batch_eligible; vision site must exist and be v1-routable).

nodes.name: llm_execution_config.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic models and loader for the per-node LLM execution config: each node declares realtime and batch transport profiles (provider, model, token limits, prompt-cache strategy) plus a default mode, resolved via resolve_profile. Vision-node presence is validated at load time.

nodes.name: batch_route.py
nodes.summary: Vision Batch route (B2): builds multimodal perception JSONL rows for slides, submits them through the LiteLLM Batch adapter, persists receipts, honors pause-vs-poll wait policies, then joins outputs back per slide and parses them into VisionProviderResponse results with a fail-soft cost report. Active only when llm_execution_mode is exactly 'batch' and the eligibility matrix marks vision v1-routable.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses WaitingForProviderBatchError as a resumable control-flow exception under the 'pause' wait policy, letting the orchestrator checkpoint and resume once the provider batch completes.

nodes.name: _coerce_file_bytes
nodes.summary: Coerces heterogeneous LiteLLM file_content return shapes (bytes, str, response objects with .content or .read(), text attributes) into raw bytes, raising a tagged LlmBatchError on unsupported types.

nodes.name: LiteLlmBatchAdapter
nodes.summary: Thin LiteLLM Batch client with injectable SDK callables (create_file, create_batch, retrieve, cancel, file_content) for hermetic testing. Offers upload_batch_jsonl, batch lifecycle methods, submit_and_receipt (submit plus persisted BatchReceipt), and join_completed_output which downloads output/error files and joins rows by custom_id.

nodes.name: _usage_from_row
nodes.summary: Safely digs the usage block (prompt/completion/cached token counts) out of a joined batch row's raw response body, returning None when any layer is missing or malformed.

nodes.name: build_batch_cost_report
nodes.summary: Aggregates token usage across joined batch rows, prices it against the cascade pricing table (with batch-discount vs realtime comparison), computes turnaround time from receipt timestamps, and assembles the full cost-report dict including ok/failed/missing row counts and diagnostic notes.

nodes.name: write_batch_cost_report
nodes.summary: Persists a batch cost report as JSON under the run's llm_batch directory, creating parent directories as needed, and returns the written path.

nodes.name: emit_batch_cost_report_fail_soft
nodes.summary: Fail-soft wrapper that builds and writes the batch cost report but swallows any exception, returning None so cost reporting can never break the production run.

nodes.name: LlmBatchError
nodes.summary: Base exception for the LLM batch transport carrying an optional machine-readable tag for classification of failure sites.

nodes.name: WaitingForProviderBatchError
nodes.summary: Control-flow exception raised when a provider batch has been submitted but is not yet terminal; carries run_id, batch_id, status, and receipt path so the orchestrator can pause the walk and resume once the batch completes.

nodes.name: JoinedBatchRow
nodes.summary: Immutable record of one joined batch output row: custom_id, ok flag, response/error payloads, and the raw row dict.

nodes.name: JoinResult
nodes.summary: Aggregate join outcome mapping custom_id to JoinedBatchRow, preserving order seen and listing missing/unexpected ids, with ok_ids and failed_ids convenience accessors.

nodes.name: _row_ok
nodes.summary: Classifies a raw output row as successful: no error field, a dict response, and an HTTP 2xx status code.

nodes.name: join_output_rows
nodes.summary: Joins raw output rows to expected custom_ids, rejecting rows without ids and duplicate ids, classifying each row ok/failed, and computing missing and unexpected id sets into a JoinResult.

nodes.name: parse_output_jsonl
nodes.summary: Decodes provider output JSONL (bytes or str) into a list of row dicts, skipping blank lines and non-dict entries.

nodes.name: estimate_jsonl_bytes
nodes.summary: Estimates the encoded JSONL byte size of a row sequence using compact JSON separators plus newline overhead.

nodes.name: assert_within_size_budget
nodes.summary: Raises a tagged LlmBatchError when the estimated JSONL payload exceeds the provider upload byte budget, reporting actual vs allowed size.

nodes.name: encode_batch_jsonl
nodes.summary: Encodes request rows into a newline-terminated JSONL byte payload after asserting the size budget.

nodes.name: make_chat_completions_row
nodes.summary: Builds a single /v1/chat/completions batch request row with custom_id, model, messages, optional max_completion_tokens/temperature, and merged extra_body (e.g., prompt-cache key).

nodes.name: derive_prompt_cache_key
nodes.summary: Maps a configured prompt-cache-key strategy name to a concrete cache key for a node, falling back to treating unknown strategies as literal keys.

nodes.name: resolve_vision_prompt_cache_key
nodes.summary: Loads the LLM execution config, resolves the vision node's transport profile for the given mode, and derives the prompt-cache key from its configured strategy, validating mode values.

nodes.name: prompt_cache_extra_body
nodes.summary: Wraps a resolved cache key into the extra_body dict shape ({'prompt_cache_key': ...}) expected by chat-completions request rows, returning None when no key applies.

nodes.name: extract_cached_tokens
nodes.summary: Extracts the cached_tokens count from a usage object's prompt_tokens_details, defensively handling missing or malformed layers by returning 0.

nodes.name: BatchReceipt
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of a durable batch submission receipt: run/batch/file ids, status, endpoint, provider, model, completion window, timestamps, row and request counts, and metadata. Serves as the resume anchor for pending provider batches.

nodes.name: write_receipt
nodes.summary: Serializes a BatchReceipt to JSON at the canonical receipt path under the run directory, creating directories as needed.

nodes.name: read_receipt
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the persisted BatchReceipt for a run from its canonical receipt path, returning None if absent.

nodes.name: normalize_batch_object
nodes.summary: Normalizes heterogeneous LiteLLM batch return objects (dicts or attribute objects) into a BatchReceipt, coercing ids, statuses, timestamps, request counts, and metadata with defensive fallbacks.

nodes.name: EligibilitySite
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of one pipeline site's batch eligibility: batch_eligible and v1_routed flags, criteria met, and rationale, with a validator enforcing that v1-routing implies eligibility.

nodes.name: BatchEligibilityMatrix
nodes.summary: Top-level eligibility matrix mapping site names to EligibilitySite entries, validating that the vision site exists and is v1-routable, with query helpers (site, is_batch_eligible, is_v1_batch_routable, v1_routable_sites).

nodes.name: load_batch_eligibility
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the batch-eligibility matrix YAML from its default state/config path (or an override) into a BatchEligibilityMatrix.

nodes.name: NodeTransportProfile
nodes.summary: Pydantic model of a single transport profile for a node: provider, model, max completion tokens, reasoning effort, verbosity, prompt-cache strategy/retention, batch model fallback family, and harness baseline batch id.

nodes.name: NodeExecutionProfile
nodes.summary: Per-node execution profile holding default_mode plus realtime and batch NodeTransportProfiles, with profile_for(mode) selecting the transport for a requested mode and rejecting unknown modes.

nodes.name: LlmExecutionConfig
nodes.summary: Top-level LLM execution config mapping node names to NodeExecutionProfiles with a global default mode; validates that the vision node exists and exposes node() and resolve_profile() lookups.

nodes.name: load_llm_execution
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the LLM execution YAML config from its default state/config path (or an override) into an LlmExecutionConfig.

nodes.name: resolve_vision_execution_mode
nodes.summary: Reads llm_execution_mode from the specialist payload, defaulting to 'realtime'; only the exact string 'batch' turns the batch route ON.

nodes.name: _assert_unique_slide_ids
nodes.summary: Validates that every slide has a non-empty, unique slide_id, raising VisionProviderError on blanks or duplicates so custom_ids remain unambiguous.

nodes.name: build_vision_batch_rows
nodes.summary: Builds one chat-completions batch row per slide: resolves the vision prompt-cache key, constructs multimodal perception messages for each PNG, and packages them with per-slide custom_ids for provider Batch submission.

nodes.name: extract_assistant_text
nodes.summary: Digs the assistant message text out of a joined batch row's raw response (response body, choices, message, content), raising VisionProviderError with the custom_id when any layer is malformed or empty.

nodes.name: poll_until_terminal
nodes.summary: Polls the adapter for the batch's status at a fixed interval until it reaches a terminal state or a timeout elapses, normalizing each polled object into a BatchReceipt and raising a tagged LlmBatchError on timeout.

nodes.name: run_vision_batch_perception
nodes.summary: End-to-end vision batch perception: checks eligibility and execution config, resumes from a persisted receipt or builds rows and submits a new batch, honors 'pause' (raise WaitingForProviderBatchError) vs 'poll' wait policies, then joins completed output, emits a fail-soft cost report, and parses each slide's assistant text into VisionProviderResponse results in input order.

nodes.name: selection_policy_validators.py
nodes.summary: Placeholder module reserving the four-file-lockstep validator slot for ModelSelectionPolicy cross-field checks; the no-silent-conflicts invariant currently lives inline in the model itself pending future selector enhancements.

nodes.name: _flake_rate.py
nodes.summary: Per-cell flake-rate calculator for TW-7c-6 scaffold checks: Pydantic input/verdict models plus an evaluator that checks whether a test cell's failure rate stays within its class-specific budget (pre-7c 0.1% vs 7c-added 0.05%).
nodes.languageNotes: Pydantic v2 models with extra='forbid', validate_assignment=True, and an after-mode model_validator enforcing failed_runs <= total_runs.

nodes.name: CellFlakeInput
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a per-cell run result (cell id, class, total/failed runs) with a validator rejecting failed_runs above total_runs.

nodes.name: CellFlakeVerdict
nodes.summary: Pydantic verdict model carrying the computed flake rate, applicable budget, and within_budget boolean for a cell.

nodes.name: budget_for_cell_class
nodes.summary: Returns the flake budget constant for a given cell class (pre-7c or 7c-added).

nodes.name: evaluate_cell_flake_budget
nodes.summary: Computes a cell's flake rate from its run counts and returns a CellFlakeVerdict comparing it against the class budget.

nodes.name: tw_7c_3_firing.py
nodes.summary: Single-source TW-7c-3 four-file-lockstep firing rule: given a decision-card gate id, verifies that all four required files (model, JSON schema, shape-pin test, golden fixture) exist in the repo and reports any missing kinds.

nodes.name: LockstepResult
nodes.summary: Pydantic result model for the lockstep check: gate id, per-kind file presence map, all_four_present flag, and optional failure reason.

nodes.name: LOCKSTEP_CHECK
nodes.summary: Resolves the four expected file paths for a gate id from FOUR_FILE_GLOBS templates, checks each for existence, and returns a LockstepResult naming any missing kinds.

nodes.name: parity_comparison.py
nodes.summary: Head-to-head parity comparison tool for Slab 5a.2: canonicalizes control-plane artifacts (course/module context, asset specs, motion plan) from a primary bundle and a clone run, scores tier-1 presence and tier-2 semantic match against thresholds, and renders a markdown evidence report via a CLI entry point.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses regex-based canonicalization (run-id, UUID, timestamp scrubbing) so semantically equal artifacts compare equal despite run-specific identifiers; artifact pairs are declared as data via ArtifactParitySpec with canonicalizer callables.

nodes.name: ArtifactParitySpec
